sections.description: Global and China-facing headlines from public RSS feeds.

title.original: Trump Reinstates Iran Blockade, Plans Hormuz Ship Fee
title.en: Trump Reinstates Iran Blockade, Plans Hormuz Ship Fee
title.zh: 特朗普恢复对伊朗封锁，计划霍尔木兹运费收费
title.es: Trump restablece el bloqueo a Irán y planea cobrar tarifa a barcos en el Hormuz

summary.original: According to the Bloomberg Markets video, US President Donald Trump reinstated the blockade of Iranian ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz. He also demanded a 20% reimbursement fee for all other cargo shipped via this waterway. This information is presented by Bloomberg's Stuart Livingstone-Wallace and a Marisks CEO who discuss the related business and market implications.
summary.en: According to the Bloomberg Markets video, US President Donald Trump reinstated the blockade of Iranian ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz. He also demanded a 20% reimbursement fee for all other cargo shipped via this waterway. This information is presented by Bloomberg's Stuart Livingstone-Wallace and a Marisks CEO who discuss the related business and market implications.
summary.zh: 彭博市场视频报道，美国总统唐纳德·特朗普恢复对通过霍尔木兹海峡的伊朗船只封锁，并要求对所有其它货物收取20%的费用。彭博的Stuart Livingstone-Wallace和Marisks首席执行官讨论相关商业和市场影响。
summary.es: Según Bloomberg Markets, el presidente Donald Trump restableció el bloqueo a barcos iraníes que transitan el Estrecho de Hormuz y exige una tarifa del 20% por el resto de la carga que pase. Stuart Livingstone-Wallace de Bloomberg y un CEO de Marisks analizan las implicaciones comerciales y de mercado.

title.original: Oil Advances Above $85 on Hormuz Tensions
title.en: Oil Advances Above $85 on Hormuz Tensions
title.zh: 油价因霍尔木兹紧张局势突破85美元
title.es: El petróleo supera los $85 por tensiones en Hormuz

summary.original: The Bloomberg Markets report states that Brent crude oil prices rose above $85 a barrel for the first time in a month. This increase is linked to President Donald Trump reimposing a blockade on Iranian ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz and demanding payment for all other cargo passing through. The video is reported by Bloomberg's Rong Wei Neo.
summary.en: The Bloomberg Markets report states that Brent crude oil prices rose above $85 a barrel for the first time in a month. This increase is linked to President Donald Trump reimposing a blockade on Iranian ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz and demanding payment for all other cargo passing through. The video is reported by Bloomberg's Rong Wei Neo.
summary.zh: 彭博市场报道布伦特原油价格一个月内首次突破每桶85美元。上涨与特朗普总统重新实施霍尔木兹海峡伊朗船只封锁及收取通行货物费用有关。报道由彭博记者Rong Wei Neo呈现。
summary.es: El informe de Bloomberg Markets señala que el precio del crudo Brent superó los $85 el barril por primera vez en un mes, vinculado al bloqueo impuesto por Trump a barcos iraníes en el Estrecho de Hormuz y el cobro a toda otra carga, reporta Rong Wei Neo.

title.original: Live Updates: U.S. Strikes Iran for 3rd Night, in Return to Open Conflict
title.en: Live Updates: U.S. Strikes Iran for 3rd Night, in Return to Open Conflict
title.zh: 即时更新：美国连续第三晚空袭伊朗，重返公开冲突
title.es: Actualizaciones en vivo: EE.UU. ataca Irán por tercera noche, retorno a conflicto abierto

summary.original: The United States has conducted airstrikes against Iran for a third consecutive night amid escalating tensions over control of the Strait of Hormuz. President Trump announced a 20 percent fee on cargo shipped through the strategic waterway. Iran reported attacking two tankers transiting the Strait, indicating intensifying conflict between the nations. Specific details on the broader geopolitical implications or further developments are limited in the evidence provided.
summary.en: The United States has conducted airstrikes against Iran for a third consecutive night amid escalating tensions over control of the Strait of Hormuz. President Trump announced a 20 percent fee on cargo shipped through the strategic waterway. Iran reported attacking two tankers transiting the Strait, indicating intensifying conflict between the nations. Specific details on the broader geopolitical implications or further developments are limited in the evidence provided.
summary.zh: 美国连续第三晚对伊朗发动空袭，紧张局势因霍尔木兹海峡控制权升级。特朗普总统宣布对该水道运输货物征收20%费用。伊朗称攻击了两艘过境油轮，表明两国冲突加剧。证据中缺乏更广泛地缘政治影响或进一步发展细节。
summary.es: Estados Unidos lanzó ataques aéreos contra Irán por tercera noche consecutiva en medio de tensiones por el control del Estrecho de Hormuz. El presidente Trump anunció un impuesto del 20% al transporte de carga por esta vía estratégica. Irán reportó ataques a dos petroleros que transitaban el estrecho, indicando una escalada del conflicto. No se proveen más detalles sobre implicaciones geopolíticas o desarrollos adicionales.

title.original: Philippine rice output risks 30% collapse as ‘super’ El Nino strengthens
title.en: Philippine rice output risks 30% collapse as ‘super’ El Nino strengthens
title.zh: 菲律宾稻米产量恐因“超级”厄尔尼诺加强而下跌30%
title.es: La producción de arroz filipina corre riesgo de caer un 30% por el fortalecimiento del 'super' El Niño

summary.original: The South China Morning Post article covers concerns about a potential 30% reduction in Philippine rice output due to a strengthening 'super' El Nino. Farmers in central Luzon are worried as weather bureau Pagasa forecasts that El Nino conditions, already present, will intensify from August through the end of the year. This could result in rice production dropping by about 700,000 tonnes and evokes memories of the 1997-98 drought. Despite official plans on paper, local farmers report they have seen little visible support so far.
summary.en: The South China Morning Post article covers concerns about a potential 30% reduction in Philippine rice output due to a strengthening 'super' El Nino. Farmers in central Luzon are worried as weather bureau Pagasa forecasts that El Nino conditions, already present, will intensify from August through the end of the year. This could result in rice production dropping by about 700,000 tonnes and evokes memories of the 1997-98 drought. Despite official plans on paper, local farmers report they have seen little visible support so far.
summary.zh: 南华早报报道，由于“超级”厄尔尼诺加强，菲律宾稻米产量可能减少30%。中吕宋农民担忧天气局预测从8月至年底，厄尔尼诺状况将加剧，预计产量下降约70万吨，令人想起1997-98年干旱。尽管有官方计划，农民表示支持有限。
summary.es: South China Morning Post informa que la producción de arroz en Filipinas podría caer un 30% debido al fortalecimiento del 'super' El Niño. Agricultores en Luzón central están preocupados pues Pagasa pronostica que las condiciones empeorarán de agosto a fin de año, con una posible disminución de 700,000 toneladas, rememorando la sequía 1997-98. Los agricultores reportan poco apoyo visible pese a planes oficiales.

title.original: What to Expect From Wall Street Banks Earnings
title.en: What to Expect From Wall Street Banks Earnings
title.zh: 华尔街银行盈利期望展望
title.es: Qué esperar de las ganancias de los bancos de Wall Street

summary.original: Bloomberg Markets reports that analysts expect JPMorgan Chase & Co., Bank of America, Citigroup, Goldman Sachs Group, and Morgan Stanley to report nearly $39 billion in trading revenue for the second quarter. Bloomberg's Balázs Penz provides an analysis of this upcoming Wall Street banks' earnings season.
summary.en: Bloomberg Markets reports that analysts expect JPMorgan Chase & Co., Bank of America, Citigroup, Goldman Sachs Group, and Morgan Stanley to report nearly $39 billion in trading revenue for the second quarter. Bloomberg's Balázs Penz provides an analysis of this upcoming Wall Street banks' earnings season.
summary.zh: 彭博市场报道，分析师预计摩根大通、美国银行、花旗、高盛和摩根士丹利第二季度交易收入将接近390亿美元。彭博的Balázs Penz分析了即将到来的华尔街银行财报季。
summary.es: Bloomberg Markets informa que analistas esperan que JPMorgan Chase, Bank of America, Citigroup, Goldman Sachs y Morgan Stanley reporten cerca de $39 mil millones en ingresos por trading en el segundo trimestre. Balázs Penz brinda análisis sobre la temporada de ganancias de estos bancos.

title.original: US launches air strikes as Iran targets tankers with cruise missiles
title.en: US launches air strikes as Iran targets tankers with cruise missiles
title.zh: 美国发动空袭 伊朗用巡航导弹攻击油轮
title.es: EE.UU. lanza ataques aéreos mientras Irán ataca petroleros con misiles crucero

summary.original: The United States has launched air strikes amid reports that Iran targeted tankers using cruise missiles. The briefing notes that Donald Trump has demanded a 20% fee on cargoes passing through the Strait of Hormuz. This summary is drawn exclusively from the evidence provided and does not incorporate external information.
summary.en: The United States has launched air strikes amid reports that Iran targeted tankers using cruise missiles. The briefing notes that Donald Trump has demanded a 20% fee on cargoes passing through the Strait of Hormuz. This summary is drawn exclusively from the evidence provided and does not incorporate external information.
summary.zh: 美国发动空袭回应伊朗使用巡航导弹袭击油轮的报道。简报提及唐纳德·特朗普要求对通过霍尔木兹海峡的货物收取20%费用。本摘要仅基于提供证据，不包含外部信息。
summary.es: Estados Unidos ha lanzado ataques aéreos en medio de reportes de que Irán atacó petroleros usando misiles crucero. El informe señala que Donald Trump ha exigido una tarifa del 20% sobre las cargas que pasan por el Estrecho de Ormuz. Este resumen se extrae exclusivamente de la evidencia proporcionada y no incluye información externa.

title.original: PE Fund Harith Gets Antitrust Approval to Acquire FlySafair
title.en: PE Fund Harith Gets Antitrust Approval to Acquire FlySafair
title.zh: 私募基金Harith获反垄断批准收购FlySafair
title.es: El fondo PE Harith obtiene aprobación antimonopolio para adquirir FlySafair

summary.original: According to Bloomberg Markets, South Africa’s antitrust regulator has approved a proposal by private equity firm Harith General Partners to acquire the budget airline FlySafair. This approval allows Harith to proceed with the acquisition as per the news report. The information is directly supported by the article text provided.
summary.en: According to Bloomberg Markets, South Africa’s antitrust regulator has approved a proposal by private equity firm Harith General Partners to acquire the budget airline FlySafair. This approval allows Harith to proceed with the acquisition as per the news report. The information is directly supported by the article text provided.
summary.zh: 彭博市场报道，南非反垄断监管机构批准私募股权公司Harith General Partners收购低价航空公司FlySafair的提议。该批准允许Harith继续推进收购。
summary.es: Según Bloomberg Markets, el regulador antimonopolio de Sudáfrica aprobó la propuesta del fondo de inversión privada Harith General Partners para adquirir la aerolínea de bajo costo FlySafair, permitiendo así que Harith continúe con la adquisición.

title.original: Viral photos of heavy-duty drones rescuing China’s flood victims spark debate
title.en: Viral photos of heavy-duty drones rescuing China’s flood victims spark debate
title.zh: 重型无人机救援中国洪灾受灾者的照片引发热议
title.es: Fotos virales de drones pesados rescatando víctimas de inundaciones en China generan debate

summary.original: The South China Morning Post reports that recent photos and discussions about the use of heavy-duty drones to rescue villagers affected by flooding in Guangxi have gone viral. The article notes that nearly two decades ago, China relied on riskier, low-tech methods for disaster relief, such as paratrooper drops during the 2008 earthquake. Since then, China's technological advancements, particularly in drone development and deployment, have improved emergency responses, allowing drones to conduct surveys, identify trapped residents, and in some cases airlift people from rooftops amid floods. The drone company DJI has stated its drones should not be used for airlifting people, but the technology arguably prevented greater loss of life during Typhoon Maysak. The briefing is based solely on the supplied article text and is source-limited.
summary.en: The South China Morning Post reports that recent photos and discussions about the use of heavy-duty drones to rescue villagers affected by flooding in Guangxi have gone viral. The article notes that nearly two decades ago, China relied on riskier, low-tech methods for disaster relief, such as paratrooper drops during the 2008 earthquake. Since then, China's technological advancements, particularly in drone development and deployment, have improved emergency responses, allowing drones to conduct surveys, identify trapped residents, and in some cases airlift people from rooftops amid floods. The drone company DJI has stated its drones should not be used for airlifting people, but the technology arguably prevented greater loss of life during Typhoon Maysak. The briefing is based solely on the supplied article text and is source-limited.
summary.zh: 南华早报报道，广西洪灾中使用重型无人机救援村民的照片和讨论走红。约20年前中国依赖低技术风险较高的方法救灾，如2008年地震时投放伞兵。此后中国无人机技术进步显著，提升了应急反应能力。无人机可进行测绘、定位被困者，甚至在洪灾中空运人，但无人机公司DJI表示无人机不应用于空运人员。此技术在台风“玛伊萨克”中帮助减少了人员伤亡。报道仅基于提供的文章内容。
summary.es: El South China Morning Post informa que fotos virales y debates sobre el uso de drones pesados para rescatar a aldeanos en inundaciones de Guangxi han surgido. Hace casi 20 años, China usaba métodos de bajo nivel tecnológico y mayor riesgo, como paracaidistas en el terremoto de 2008. Desde entonces, avances tecnológicos en drones han mejorado la respuesta, permitiendo vuelos de reconocimiento, identificación y en algunos casos, rescate aéreo durante inundaciones. DJI indicó que sus drones no deben usarse para transportar personas, pero la tecnología evitó mayores pérdidas durante el tifón Maysak. Resumen basado solo en el texto proporcionado.

title.original: How US commerce secretary's Epstein links were uncovered by British whistleblower
title.en: How US commerce secretary's Epstein links were uncovered by British whistleblower
title.zh: 美国商务部长与爱泼斯坦关系如何被英国吹哨人揭露
title.es: Cómo un denunciante británico reveló los vínculos del secretario de comercio de EE. UU. con Epstein

summary.original: A British whistleblower named Simon Andriesz uncovered evidence from publicly released Jeffrey Epstein files indicating that Howard Lutnick, who was appointed US commerce secretary in 2025, failed to disclose a business relationship with Epstein. Andriesz, formerly an executive at a Wall Street firm, found a 2018 email chain showing Lutnick and Epstein discussing a start-up they both invested in. Andriesz shared these findings with members of the US House Oversight Committee ahead of Lutnick's May appearance. Lutnick claimed he only learned this year that Epstein was an investor in the firm, and the Commerce Department said no wrongdoing was found. Other files showed plans involving Lutnick's firms and Prince Andrew. Andriesz also revealed he had raised internal concerns about Lutnick's firm BGC Partners, which was later fined for regulatory violations. Despite these findings, Andriesz said few showed interest in his disclosures. Democrats on the committee have accused Lutnick of lying and requested his resignation, though he denies any misconduct. This summary is based on the detailed report from BBC Business and is not supplemented with outside information.
summary.en: A British whistleblower named Simon Andriesz uncovered evidence from publicly released Jeffrey Epstein files indicating that Howard Lutnick, who was appointed US commerce secretary in 2025, failed to disclose a business relationship with Epstein. Andriesz, formerly an executive at a Wall Street firm, found a 2018 email chain showing Lutnick and Epstein discussing a start-up they both invested in. Andriesz shared these findings with members of the US House Oversight Committee ahead of Lutnick's May appearance. Lutnick claimed he only learned this year that Epstein was an investor in the firm, and the Commerce Department said no wrongdoing was found. Other files showed plans involving Lutnick's firms and Prince Andrew. Andriesz also revealed he had raised internal concerns about Lutnick's firm BGC Partners, which was later fined for regulatory violations. Despite these findings, Andriesz said few showed interest in his disclosures. Democrats on the committee have accused Lutnick of lying and requested his resignation, though he denies any misconduct. This summary is based on the detailed report from BBC Business and is not supplemented with outside information.
summary.zh: 英国吹哨人西蒙·安德利斯根据公开的杰弗里·爱泼斯坦文件，发现2025年任命的美国商务部长霍华德·卢特尼克未披露与爱泼斯坦的商业关系。安德利斯发现一封2018年电子邮件，显示两人讨论共同投资的初创企业，并向美国众议院监督委员会披露。卢特尼克声称今年才知情，商务部未发现违规。其他文件涉及卢特尼克公司与安德鲁王子合作。安德利斯此前曾内部举报卢特尼克公司违规，后该公司被罚。民主党委员要求其辞职，他否认不当行为。总结基于BBC商业报道。
summary.es: Un denunciante británico, Simon Andriesz, descubrió en archivos públicos de Jeffrey Epstein que Howard Lutnick, designado secretario de comercio de EE. UU. en 2025, no reveló su relación comercial con Epstein. Andriesz halló un correo de 2018 donde ambos discutían una startup en la que invirtieron y compartió esta información con el Comité de Supervisión de la Cámara de EE. UU. antes de la comparecencia de Lutnick en mayo. Lutnick afirmó que recién este año supo de la inversión de Epstein, y el Departamento de Comercio no encontró irregularidades. Otros archivos mencionan planes entre las firmas de Lutnick y el príncipe Andrew. Andriesz también reportó preocupaciones internas sobre BGC Partners, firma de Lutnick, sancionada después. Demócratas pidieron su renuncia por presunta mentira; él niega mala conducta. Resumen basado en BBC Business.

title.original: UK’s Miliband Seen as Least Appealing Chancellor: Markets Pulse
title.en: UK’s Miliband Seen as Least Appealing Chancellor: Markets Pulse
title.zh: 英国米利班德被视为最不受欢迎的财政大臣候选人：市场脉动
title.es: Miliband de Reino Unido visto como el canciller menos atractivo: Markets Pulse

summary.original: A Bloomberg Markets report states that among the presumptive candidates for UK Prime Minister Andy Burnham's choice for Chancellor of the Exchequer, Energy Secretary Ed Miliband is viewed as the least market-friendly option according to the latest Bloomberg Markets Live Pulse survey. As of the report, Andy Burnham has not yet announced his chancellor pick. The summary is based on the article's information and is source-limited.
summary.en: A Bloomberg Markets report states that among the presumptive candidates for UK Prime Minister Andy Burnham's choice for Chancellor of the Exchequer, Energy Secretary Ed Miliband is viewed as the least market-friendly option according to the latest Bloomberg Markets Live Pulse survey. As of the report, Andy Burnham has not yet announced his chancellor pick. The summary is based on the article's information and is source-limited.
summary.zh: 彭博市场报道，在英国首相候选人安迪·伯纳姆拟选财政大臣的候选人中，能源大臣埃德·米利班德被最新的彭博市场动脉调查评为对市场最不友好。伯纳姆尚未宣布最终人选。总结仅基于该报道信息。
summary.es: Un informe de Bloomberg Markets indica que, entre los candidatos probables para canciller del Reino Unido escogidos por Andy Burnham, el secretario de Energía Ed Miliband es considerado la opción menos favorable para el mercado según la última encuesta Bloomberg Markets Live Pulse. Burnham aún no ha anunciado su elección final. Resumen basado únicamente en la información del artículo.

title.original: The star-studded World Cup semifinals kick off with France vs. Spain
title.en: The star-studded World Cup semifinals kick off with France vs. Spain
title.zh: 星光熠熠的世界杯半决赛开启，法国对阵西班牙
title.es: Las semifinales estelares del Mundial comienzan con Francia vs. España

summary.original: The NPR article details the 2026 FIFA World Cup semifinals featuring matchups of France vs. Spain and Argentina vs. England, held in Arlington and Atlanta respectively. FIFA introduced a new seeding system for the expanded tournament, placing the top four ranked teams—Spain, Argentina, France, and England—in opposite corners of the knockout bracket. France is favored against Spain, boasting a strong attack led by Kylian Mbappé, who has scored eight goals. Spain approaches with a strong defense, having conceded just one goal throughout the tournament. England faces Argentina, with England seeking a World Cup final appearance for the first time since 1966, while Argentina's Lionel Messi aims for another title, contributing eight goals and two assists. Both semifinals are indoor games to avoid heat and humidity. Injuries are monitored, with Mbappé expected to play fully despite a recent minor injury, and Spain's young star Lamine Yamal recovering from a hamstring issue. The winners of these matches will meet in the final in East Rutherford, New Jersey. This summary is based solely on the NPR source and does not include additional inference.
summary.en: The NPR article details the 2026 FIFA World Cup semifinals featuring matchups of France vs. Spain and Argentina vs. England, held in Arlington and Atlanta respectively. FIFA introduced a new seeding system for the expanded tournament, placing the top four ranked teams—Spain, Argentina, France, and England—in opposite corners of the knockout bracket. France is favored against Spain, boasting a strong attack led by Kylian Mbappé, who has scored eight goals. Spain approaches with a strong defense, having conceded just one goal throughout the tournament. England faces Argentina, with England seeking a World Cup final appearance for the first time since 1966, while Argentina's Lionel Messi aims for another title, contributing eight goals and two assists. Both semifinals are indoor games to avoid heat and humidity. Injuries are monitored, with Mbappé expected to play fully despite a recent minor injury, and Spain's young star Lamine Yamal recovering from a hamstring issue. The winners of these matches will meet in the final in East Rutherford, New Jersey. This summary is based solely on the NPR source and does not include additional inference.
summary.zh: NPR报道2026年世界杯半决赛在阿灵顿和亚特兰大举行，分别为法国对西班牙和阿根廷对英格兰。国际足联采用新种子体系，四支顶级队伍分布在淘汰赛不同角落。法国凭借姆巴佩的强攻被看好，西班牙以坚守防线闻名。英格兰目标自1966年以来首次决赛，阿根廷梅西力争再夺冠。比赛均在室内进行以避开炎热潮湿。伤情监控显示姆巴佩预计全力出战，西班牙新星亚马尔恢复中。胜者将在新泽西东拉特福德决赛相遇。总结基于NPR报道。
summary.es: El artículo de NPR detalla las semifinales de la Copa Mundial FIFA 2026 en Arlington y Atlanta con enfrentamientos Francia vs. España y Argentina vs. Inglaterra. FIFA implementó un nuevo sistema de siembra colocando a los cuatro mejores equipos en esquinas opuestas. Francia es favorito, liderado por Kylian Mbappé con ocho goles. España, con fuerte defensa y solo un gol concedido, enfrenta a Francia. Inglaterra busca su primera final desde 1966 contra Argentina, donde Messi aspira a otro título con ocho goles y dos asistencias. Ambos partidos se juegan en interiores para evitar el calor y la humedad. Lesiones son monitoreadas; Mbappé está listo para jugar completamente y Lamine Yamal se recupera. Los ganadores se enfrentarán en la final en East Rutherford, Nueva Jersey. Resumen basado en NPR.

title.original: Indonesia Says S&P Affirmation to Help Stabilize Bond Market
title.en: Indonesia Says S&P Affirmation to Help Stabilize Bond Market
title.zh: 印尼称标普评级确认将助稳定债券市场
title.es: Indonesia dice que la afirmación de S&P ayudará a estabilizar el mercado de bonos

summary.original: According to Bloomberg Markets, Indonesia's finance ministry official expects that the affirmation of Indonesia's sovereign credit profile by S&P Global Ratings will help stabilize the domestic bond market. This comes after a bond market selloff in June. The summary is based on limited information from the source article and does not include inferred analysis or additional details.
summary.en: According to Bloomberg Markets, Indonesia's finance ministry official expects that the affirmation of Indonesia's sovereign credit profile by S&P Global Ratings will help stabilize the domestic bond market. This comes after a bond market selloff in June. The summary is based on limited information from the source article and does not include inferred analysis or additional details.
summary.zh: 彭博市场报道，印尼财政部官员预计标普全球评级对印尼主权信用状况的确认将有助于稳定国内债券市场，此前六月份债市出现抛售。总结仅基于来源信息，无额外分析。
summary.es: Según Bloomberg Markets, un funcionario del ministerio de finanzas de Indonesia espera que la afirmación del perfil crediticio soberano de Indonesia por S&P Global Ratings ayude a estabilizar el mercado interno de bonos, tras una venta masiva en junio. Resumen basado únicamente en la información del artículo fuente sin análisis adicional.

title.original: ‘The Hunt for Gollum’ Star Anya Taylor-Joy Has Not Read the ‘Lord of the Rings’ Books Yet, but Is ‘About to’ Soon
title.en: ‘The Hunt for Gollum’ Star Anya Taylor-Joy Has Not Read the ‘Lord of the Rings’ Books Yet, but Is ‘About to’ Soon
title.zh: 《魔戒：寻找咕噜》主演安雅·泰勒-乔尚未读原著小说，但即将开始
title.es: La estrella de ’The Hunt for Gollum’, Anya Taylor-Joy, aún no ha leído los libros de ’El Señor de los Anillos’, pero pronto lo hará

summary.original: Variety reports that Anya Taylor-Joy, who stars in 'The Lord of the Rings: The Hunt for Gollum,' has not yet read the original 'Lord of the Rings' books but is about to start reading them. She shared that as a child, she was a devoted 'Harry Potter' fan and mistakenly thought fandoms were exclusive. During the COVID period, she watched all the 'Lord of the Rings' films and realized one can enjoy both franchises. Taylor-Joy plays Seren, a Sindar Elf of the Woodland Realm, described as a trusted and lethal agent of King Thranduil in the upcoming film directed by Andy Serkis. The movie explores Aragorn's search for Gollum between 'The Hobbit' and 'The Fellowship of the Ring.' The summary is strictly based on the Variety article's information.
summary.en: Variety reports that Anya Taylor-Joy, who stars in 'The Lord of the Rings: The Hunt for Gollum,' has not yet read the original 'Lord of the Rings' books but is about to start reading them. She shared that as a child, she was a devoted 'Harry Potter' fan and mistakenly thought fandoms were exclusive. During the COVID period, she watched all the 'Lord of the Rings' films and realized one can enjoy both franchises. Taylor-Joy plays Seren, a Sindar Elf of the Woodland Realm, described as a trusted and lethal agent of King Thranduil in the upcoming film directed by Andy Serkis. The movie explores Aragorn's search for Gollum between 'The Hobbit' and 'The Fellowship of the Ring.' The summary is strictly based on the Variety article's information.
summary.zh: 据Variety报道，安雅·泰勒-乔主演《魔戒：寻找咕噜》，尚未读过《魔戒》原著小说，但即将开始阅读。她童年是哈利·波特粉丝，曾误以为不同粉丝群互斥。疫情期间，她观看全部《魔戒》电影，意识到可同时喜爱两者。她饰演伍德兰界辛达精灵塞伦，是国王瑟兰迪尔的可靠致命探员。该片由安迪·瑟金斯执导，讲述亚拉冈在《霍比特人》和《护戒使者》之间寻找咕噜故事。总结基于Variety报道。
summary.es: Variety informa que Anya Taylor-Joy, estrella de ’The Lord of the Rings: The Hunt for Gollum’, aún no ha leído los libros originales de ’El Señor de los Anillos’, pero pronto comenzará. Compartió que en su infancia fue fan de ’Harry Potter’ y creía erróneamente que los fandoms eran excluyentes. Durante la pandemia vio todas las películas de ’El Señor de los Anillos’ y comprendió que se puede disfrutar ambos universos. Taylor-Joy interpreta a Seren, una elfa Sindar del Reino del Bosque, agente confiable y letal del Rey Thranduil en la película dirigida por Andy Serkis. La historia sigue la búsqueda de Aragorn de Gollum entre ’El Hobbit’ y ’La Comunidad del Anillo’. Resumen basado exclusivamente en Variety.

title.original: UAE condemns Iran's 'brazen' attack on tankers as US launches fresh strikes
title.en: UAE condemns Iran's 'brazen' attack on tankers as US launches fresh strikes
title.zh: 阿联酋谴责伊朗对油轮“公然”袭击，美国发动新一轮打击
title.es: EAU condena ataque

summary.original: BBC World reports escalating tensions in the Strait of Hormuz with the UAE condemning what it calls a 'brazen' Iranian attack on two tankers, resulting in one fatality and eight injuries. The US has launched strikes on Iran for the third consecutive night as part of an escalating conflict. President Donald Trump announced a 20% charge on cargo through the Strait and reinstated a naval blockade to control the waterway, effective July 14th. Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps confirmed the strikes on the tankers, accusing them of ignoring warnings and passing through mined waters, and stated cooperation with what they call the 'aggressor enemy' would cause regret. Oil prices rose following the attacks. Iran's foreign minister responded by declaring Iran will remain the 'guardian' of the Strait. The US Central Command confirmed strikes on multiple Iranian military targets to degrade their offensive capabilities. Iran retaliated with attacks on US military assets in Kuwait, Bahrain, and an airbase in Jordan. The International Maritime Organization stated opposition to mandatory tolls for passage through international straits. This briefing is based solely on information from the BBC article without added inference.
summary.en: BBC World reports escalating tensions in the Strait of Hormuz with the UAE condemning what it calls a 'brazen' Iranian attack on two tankers, resulting in one fatality and eight injuries. The US has launched strikes on Iran for the third consecutive night as part of an escalating conflict. President Donald Trump announced a 20% charge on cargo through the Strait and reinstated a naval blockade to control the waterway, effective July 14th. Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps confirmed the strikes on the tankers, accusing them of ignoring warnings and passing through mined waters, and stated cooperation with what they call the 'aggressor enemy' would cause regret. Oil prices rose following the attacks. Iran's foreign minister responded by declaring Iran will remain the 'guardian' of the Strait. The US Central Command confirmed strikes on multiple Iranian military targets to degrade their offensive capabilities. Iran retaliated with attacks on US military assets in Kuwait, Bahrain, and an airbase in Jordan. The International Maritime Organization stated opposition to mandatory tolls for passage through international straits. This briefing is based solely on information from the BBC article without added inference.
summary.zh: 据BBC报道，霍尔木兹海峡局势升级，阿联酋谴责伊朗对两艘油轮的“公然”袭击，造成1人死亡8人受伤。美国连续第三晚对伊朗发动空袭，特朗普宣布自7月14日起对霍尔木兹海峡货物征收20%关税并恢复海军封锁。伊朗革命卫队称油轮通过水雷区无视警告并威胁不合作者。袭击后油价上涨。伊朗外交部长表示将继续守护海峡。美军中央司令部确认多处伊朗军事目标遭打击。伊朗反击攻击科威特、巴林美军及约旦空军基地。国际海事组织反对国际海峡征收强制过路费。总结仅基于BBC报道。
summary.es: Según BBC World, la tensión en el Estrecho de Ormuz aumenta con EAU condenando un ataque

title.original: New HK$45,000 job scheme expected to benefit single-parent families most
title.en: New HK$45,000 job scheme expected to benefit single-parent families most
title.zh: 新港币4.5万元就业计划预计单亲家庭获益最大
title.es: Nuevo plan de empleo de HK$45,000 en Hong Kong se espera beneficie más a familias monoparentales

summary.original: The article reports that Hong Kong is launching a three-year pilot job scheme starting October 1, offering up to HK$45,000 in cash incentives to welfare recipients to encourage employment and self-reliance. Funded by the Community Care Fund, the scheme targets families transitioning from the Comprehensive Social Security Assistance (CSSA) to the Working Family Allowance (WFA) program. It provides cash amounts over three years, increasing from HK$10,000 in the first year to HK$20,000 in the third. Lawmakers have said that single-parent families might benefit most due to lower working-hour requirements under the WFA for them—36 hours per month compared to 144-192 hours for general applicants. Legislators have also urged more flexible eligibility rules and better employment support, including targeted job matching for women with caregiving responsibilities and use of after-school care services. To be eligible, households must leave CSSA and secure at least two consecutive WFA applications approved within 12 months, receiving payments for at least 10 months.
summary.en: The article reports that Hong Kong is launching a three-year pilot job scheme starting October 1, offering up to HK$45,000 in cash incentives to welfare recipients to encourage employment and self-reliance. Funded by the Community Care Fund, the scheme targets families transitioning from the Comprehensive Social Security Assistance (CSSA) to the Working Family Allowance (WFA) program. It provides cash amounts over three years, increasing from HK$10,000 in the first year to HK$20,000 in the third. Lawmakers have said that single-parent families might benefit most due to lower working-hour requirements under the WFA for them—36 hours per month compared to 144-192 hours for general applicants. Legislators have also urged more flexible eligibility rules and better employment support, including targeted job matching for women with caregiving responsibilities and use of after-school care services. To be eligible, households must leave CSSA and secure at least two consecutive WFA applications approved within 12 months, receiving payments for at least 10 months.
summary.zh: 香港将于10月1日启动为期三年的试点就业计划，向福利领取者提供最高港币4.5万元现金奖励，以鼓励就业和自立。该计划由社区关怀基金资助，面向从综合社会保障援助（CSSA）过渡到在职家庭津贴（WFA）计划的家庭。现金补助为期三年，金额逐年递增，从首年的1万元到第三年的2万元。立法者指出，由于单亲家庭在WFA下的工作时长要求较低（每月36小时，相比一般申请者的144-192小时），他们可能受益最大。议员们也呼吁制定更灵活的资格规则和更完善的就业支持，包括针对有照顾责任女性的岗位匹配及课后照顾服务。符合资格的家庭须停止领取CSSA，并在12个月内至少两次连续获得WFA批准，且领取时长不少于10个月。
summary.es: Hong Kong lanzará un plan piloto de empleo de tres años a partir del 1 de octubre, ofreciendo hasta HK$45,000 en incentivos en efectivo a beneficiarios de asistencia social para fomentar el empleo y la autosuficiencia. Financiado por el Fondo de Atención Comunitaria, el plan está dirigido a familias que están en transición del Asistencia de Seguridad Social Integral (CSSA) al programa de Subsidio Familiar Trabajador (WFA). Proporciona montos en efectivo durante tres años, aumentando de HK$10,000 en el primer año a HK$20,000 en el tercero. Legisladores indican que las familias monoparentales podrían beneficiarse más debido a requisitos laborales más bajos bajo WFA para ellas—36 horas mensuales frente a 144-192 horas para solicitantes generales. Se pide flexibilidad en las reglas de elegibilidad y mejor apoyo laboral, incluyendo emparejamiento laboral para mujeres con responsabilidades de cuidado y servicios de cuidado después de la escuela. Para ser elegibles, los hogares deben salir de CSSA y obtener al menos dos aplicaciones WFA consecutivas aprobadas en 12 meses, con pagos recibidos por al menos 10 meses.

title.original: In Malaysia, viral shoe-sniffing video sparks stalking arrest
title.en: In Malaysia, viral shoe-sniffing video sparks stalking arrest
title.zh: 马来西亚病毒鞋臭视频引发跟踪案逮捕
title.es: En Malasia, video viral de olfateo de zapatos provoca arresto por acoso

summary.original: The SCMP News article states that a man in Malaysia was arrested after CCTV footage showing him sniffing a 22-year-old university student's shoes outside her flat in Shah Alam went viral. The victim reported repeated harassment since April, both at university and near her residence. The suspect, described as a male university student in his twenties with no prior criminal record and negative drug test, was given a one-day remand for further investigation. Malaysia's stalking law came into effect in May 2023.
summary.en: The SCMP News article states that a man in Malaysia was arrested after CCTV footage showing him sniffing a 22-year-old university student's shoes outside her flat in Shah Alam went viral. The victim reported repeated harassment since April, both at university and near her residence. The suspect, described as a male university student in his twenties with no prior criminal record and negative drug test, was given a one-day remand for further investigation. Malaysia's stalking law came into effect in May 2023.
summary.zh: 南华早报报道，马来西亚一男子因监控拍下其在莎阿南一大学女生公寓外嗅其鞋子而被捕。受害者自四月起多次在校园及住所附近遭骚扰。嫌疑人为二十多岁的男大学生，无前科，药检阴性，被拘留一天调查。马来西亚反跟踪法于2023年五月生效。
summary.es: SCMP News informa que un hombre en Malasia fue arrestado tras la difusión de un video de una cámara CCTV en el que olfateaba los zapatos de una estudiante universitaria de 22 años afuera de su vivienda en Shah Alam. La víctima denunció acoso repetido desde abril en la universidad y cerca de su residencia. El sospechoso, un estudiante universitario de unos veinte años sin antecedentes penales y con prueba de drogas negativa, fue detenido un día para investigación. La ley contra el acoso en Malasia entró en vigor en mayo de 2023.

title.original: South Korea’s lost Canadian deal; BN’s election win in Malaysia’s Johor: 7 Asia highlights
title.en: South Korea’s lost Canadian deal; BN’s election win in Malaysia’s Johor: 7 Asia highlights

This was seen as a notable achievement from recent Asia coverage by SCMP.

summary.es: El resumen de SCMP destaca que aunque Corea del Sur perdió un pedido multimillonario de submarinos en Canadá, los analistas consideran que la competencia con Alemania demostró la capacidad surcoreana para enfrentar a potencias establecidas en guerra submarina, un logro notable en recientes coberturas de Asia.

title.original: States Seek Injunction to Prevent Paramount-Warner Bros. Deal From Closing
title.en: States Seek Injunction to Prevent Paramount-Warner Bros. Deal From Closing
title.zh: 多州寻求禁令阻止派拉蒙-华纳兄弟合并完成
title.es: Estados buscan orden judicial para impedir cierre del acuerdo Paramount-Warner Bros.

summary.original: Variety reports that California and 11 other states have filed for a temporary restraining order and preliminary injunction to stop the Paramount-Warner Bros. merger from closing while the states pursue an antitrust lawsuit. The states requested the federal judge to act by July 22. Paramount has informed the states it will not close the deal before that date.
summary.en: Variety reports that California and 11 other states have filed for a temporary restraining order and preliminary injunction to stop the Paramount-Warner Bros. merger from closing while the states pursue an antitrust lawsuit. The states requested the federal judge to act by July 22. Paramount has informed the states it will not close the deal before that date.
summary.zh: 据综艺报道，加利福尼亚及另外11个州已申请临时禁令及初步禁制令，阻止派拉蒙和华纳兄弟的合并完成，期间将继续进行反垄断诉讼。各州请求联邦法官于7月22日前采取行动。派拉蒙已告知各州不会在该日前完成交易。
summary.es: Variety informa que California y otros 11 estados solicitaron una orden de restricción temporal y una medida cautelar preliminar para impedir que la fusión Paramount-Warner Bros. se cierre mientras continúan con una demanda antimonopolio. Los estados pidieron al juez federal actuar antes del 22 de julio. Paramount informó que no cerrará el acuerdo antes de esa fecha.

title.original: Jeju plan to allow Chinese tourist drivers stokes safety backlash in South Korea
title.en: Jeju plan to allow Chinese tourist drivers stokes safety backlash in South Korea
title.zh: 济州计划允许中国游客驾车引发韩国安全担忧
title.es: Plan de Jeju para permitir conducir a turistas chinos genera polémica de seguridad en Corea del Sur

summary.original: Jeju province in South Korea is considering allowing Chinese tourists to drive rental cars on the island, as stated by Vice-Governor Park Cheon-su on July 2 during a live-streamed meeting with officials. He mentioned this policy change could increase visitor spending and proposed short driving training sessions for Chinese tourists. This proposition revived a decade-old debate concerning safety, insurance, and legal questions. The idea prompted quick backlash, with critics expressing concerns about responsibility for accidents and the capacity of Jeju's road safety system to handle unfamiliar foreign drivers. The provincial government clarified on July 4 that this was not a reviewed or decided policy.
summary.en: Jeju province in South Korea is considering allowing Chinese tourists to drive rental cars on the island, as stated by Vice-Governor Park Cheon-su on July 2 during a live-streamed meeting with officials. He mentioned this policy change could increase visitor spending and proposed short driving training sessions for Chinese tourists. This proposition revived a decade-old debate concerning safety, insurance, and legal questions. The idea prompted quick backlash, with critics expressing concerns about responsibility for accidents and the capacity of Jeju's road safety system to handle unfamiliar foreign drivers. The provincial government clarified on July 4 that this was not a reviewed or decided policy.
summary.zh: 韩国济州省拟允许中国游客在岛上租车驾驶，副省长朴天秀7月2日直播会议中提及此举可能增加游客消费，并建议为中国游客提供短期驾驶培训。此提议引发关于安全、保险及法律责任的讨论和迅速反对，批评者担忧事故责任及济州道路安全系统对外国司机的应对能力。省政府7月4日澄清此非已审议或决定政策。
summary.es: La provincia de Jeju en Corea del Sur considera permitir a turistas chinos conducir autos de alquiler en la isla, según el Vicegobernador Park Cheon-su el 2 de julio. Propuso que esto aumentaría el gasto turístico y entrenamientos cortos de conducción. La idea reavivó un debate de una década sobre seguridad, seguros y aspectos legales, generando rápida oposición debido a preocupaciones sobre responsabilidad en accidentes y la capacidad del sistema vial de Jeju para manejar conductores extranjeros. El gobierno provincial aclaró el 4 de julio que no es una política revisada o decidida.

title.original: Jon Stewart Slams Donald Trump’s Reaction to Lindsey Graham’s Death
title.en: Jon Stewart Slams Donald Trump’s Reaction to Lindsey Graham’s Death
title.zh: 乔恩·斯图尔特抨击特朗普对林赛·格雷厄姆逝世的反应
title.es: Jon Stewart critica la reacción de Donald Trump ante la muerte de Lindsey Graham

summary.original: On the July 13 episode of "The Daily Show," Jon Stewart criticized President Donald Trump for his response to the death of Republican Senator Lindsey Graham. Graham passed away on July 11 at the age of 71. Stewart acknowledged knowing Graham somewhat from lobbying in Washington, D.C., but opted to let Graham's best friend speak about the late senator. The evidence focuses on Stewart's critique without detailing President Trump's specific comments or reactions.
summary.en: On the July 13 episode of "The Daily Show," Jon Stewart criticized President Donald Trump for his response to the death of Republican Senator Lindsey Graham. Graham passed away on July 11 at the age of 71. Stewart acknowledged knowing Graham somewhat from lobbying in Washington, D.C., but opted to let Graham's best friend speak about the late senator. The evidence focuses on Stewart's critique without detailing President Trump's specific comments or reactions.
summary.zh: 7月13日《每日秀》节目中，乔恩·斯图尔特批评特朗普总统对共和党参议员林赛·格雷厄姆去世的反应。格雷厄姆于7月11日去世，享年71岁。斯图尔特提及自己因在华盛顿参与游说与格雷厄姆有所了解，但选择让其挚友评价故人。报道未详述特朗普具体言论或反应。
summary.es: En el episodio del 13 de julio de "The Daily Show", Jon Stewart criticó la respuesta del presidente Donald Trump ante la muerte del senador republicano Lindsey Graham, quien falleció el 11 de julio a los 71 años. Stewart mencionó conocer a Graham por su trabajo en Washington y prefirió dejar que un amigo cercano hablara sobre él. La evidencia no detalla los comentarios específicos de Trump.

title.original: Why the world should copy Trump for once
title.en: Why the world should copy Trump for once
title.zh: 为何世界应当效仿特朗普一次
title.es: Por qué el mundo debería copiar a Trump por una vez

title.original: US military targeted in Iran war phone-tracking campaign

summary.en: The Financial Times reports that Iranian actors used roaming systems and advertising technology to track American military personnel in a campaign while Tehran attacked forces in the region. title.original: Death toll from Bangkok bar fire rises to 30 as police probe safety lapses
title.en: Death toll from Bangkok bar fire rises to 30 as police probe safety lapses
title.zh: 曼谷酒吧火灾死亡人数增至30人，警方调查安全漏洞
title.es: El número de muertos por el incendio en un bar de Bangkok aumenta a 30 mientras la policía investiga fallas de seguridad

summary.original: A BBC World report details a deadly fire at the Rong Beer Na Lat Phrao bar in Bangkok that has killed at least 30 people and injured more than 70, with 24 critically. Investigations suggest the blaze started by a short circuit in an air conditioner and rapidly spread due to flammable decorations like plastic flowers and combustible foam on the ceiling. Survivors and experts reported locked doors, obstructed exits, and poor signage, which hindered evacuation. Many victims were found in restrooms where escape was impossible. The bar was registered as a "restaurant with live music" rather than an "entertainment venue," and thus was not required to use fire-retardant materials. Bangkok authorities are reviewing safety regulations for such venues. The bar's owner previously lost another pub to fire in 2019 without casualties. The report includes survivor testimonies and expert opinions on toxic smoke inhalation contributing to deaths.
summary.en: A BBC World report details a deadly fire at the Rong Beer Na Lat Phrao bar in Bangkok that has killed at least 30 people and injured more than 70, with 24 critically. Investigations suggest the blaze started by a short circuit in an air conditioner and rapidly spread due to flammable decorations like plastic flowers and combustible foam on the ceiling. Survivors and experts reported locked doors, obstructed exits, and poor signage, which hindered evacuation. Many victims were found in restrooms where escape was impossible. The bar was registered as a "restaurant with live music" rather than an "entertainment venue," and thus was not required to use fire-retardant materials. Bangkok authorities are reviewing safety regulations for such venues. The bar's owner previously lost another pub to fire in 2019 without casualties. The report includes survivor testimonies and expert opinions on toxic smoke inhalation contributing to deaths.
summary.zh: BBC报道曼谷荣啤纳拉普酒吧发生火灾，造成至少30人死亡，70余人受伤。火因空调短路引发，易燃装饰助火势蔓延。门锁门道阻隔出口、疏散标识不足导致逃生困难。多受害者被困卫生间。酒吧登记为“带现场音乐的餐厅”，未强制使用阻燃材料。当地正审查相关安全法规。业主曾于2019年失去另一酒吧火灾，未造成人员伤亡。报道包含幸存者证词及专家关于有毒烟雾致死的分析。
summary.es: Un reporte de BBC detalla un incendio mortal en el bar Rong Beer Na Lat Phrao de Bangkok que ha causado al menos 30 muertos y más de 70 heridos. La investigación indica que el fuego comenzó por un cortocircuito en un aire acondicionado y se propagó rápidamente por decoraciones inflamables como flores de plástico y espuma combustible en el techo. Sobrevivientes y expertos mencionan puertas cerradas, salidas bloqueadas y señalización insuficiente que dificultaron la evacuación. Muchas víctimas se encontraron en baños donde no pudieron escapar. El bar estaba registrado como "restaurante con música en vivo", no como "local de entretenimiento", por lo que no requería materiales ignífugos. Autoridades locales revisan normas de seguridad de estos locales. El propietario perdió otro pub en un incendio en 2019 sin lesiones. El reporte incluye testimonios y análisis sobre intoxicación por humo tóxico.

title.original: Mark Wahlberg savours Penang’s charm as Malaysians floored by star’s humility
title.en: Mark Wahlberg savours Penang’s charm as Malaysians floored by star’s humility
title.zh: 马克·沃尔伯格品味槟城魅力，马来西亚人惊叹明星的谦逊
title.es: Mark Wahlberg disfruta del encanto de Penang mientras los malayos admiran la humildad de la estrella

summary.original: Mark Wahlberg visited Penang, Malaysia, to film Netflix's 'The Big Fix'. During his stay, he engaged with locals and enjoyed street food, notably at a mamak (Indian Muslim) food stall. Videos showing him casually interacting in George Town went viral on social media, impressing Malaysians with his humble demeanor. His visit also underscored Malaysia's rising attractiveness as a location for international film productions. This briefing is based solely on the provided source and does not include external information.
summary.en: Mark Wahlberg visited Penang, Malaysia, to film Netflix's 'The Big Fix'. During his stay, he engaged with locals and enjoyed street food, notably at a mamak (Indian Muslim) food stall. Videos showing him casually interacting in George Town went viral on social media, impressing Malaysians with his humble demeanor. His visit also underscored Malaysia's rising attractiveness as a location for international film productions. This briefing is based solely on the provided source and does not include external information.
summary.zh: 马克·沃尔伯格访问马来西亚槟城拍摄Netflix剧集《The Big Fix》，期间与当地人互动并品尝街头美食，尤其是在印度穆斯林餐摊。相关视频在社交媒体走红，展现了他的谦逊，引发马来西亚人赞赏。他的访问也凸显了马来西亚作为国际电影拍摄地的吸引力。该简报仅基于提供的来源。
summary.es: Mark Wahlberg visitó Penang, Malasia, para filmar 'The Big Fix' de Netflix. Durante su estancia, interactuó con locales y disfrutó de la comida callejera, especialmente en un puesto mamak (musulmán indio). Videos mostrando su interacción casual en George Town se volvieron virales, impresionando a los malayos con su humildad. Su visita también destacó la creciente atractivo de Malasia para producciones cinematográficas internacionales. Este resumen se basa únicamente en la fuente proporcionada.

title.en: Fire in Fontainebleau forest near Paris triggers evacuations; 10 still missing in Spanish wildfire

summary.en: AP News reports that a fire in the Fontainebleau forest near Paris has triggered evacuations. Additionally, 10 people remain missing due to a wildfire in Spain. The available evidence is limited to this brief situational update on wildfires and their impact.

summary.es: AP News informa que un incendio en el bosque de Fontainebleau cerca de París ha provocado evacuaciones. Además, 10 personas siguen desaparecidas debido a un incendio forestal en España. La información disponible es una breve actualización situacional sobre los incendios y su impacto.

title.original: Nvidia halves Asia buyer list in China chip crackdown
title.en: Nvidia halves Asia buyer list in China chip crackdown
title.zh: 因中国芯片整顿，英伟达亚洲买家名单减半
title.es: Nvidia reduce a la mitad su lista de compradores en Asia en medio de la represión a chips en China

summary.original: Nvidia has significantly reduced its list of buyers in Asia, including in Singapore, Malaysia, and Japan. This move is part of a tougher vetting process reflecting Washington's push to close export-control loopholes amid a crackdown related to China's chip industry. The information is summarized strictly from the provided source without further elaboration.
summary.en: Nvidia has significantly reduced its list of buyers in Asia, including in Singapore, Malaysia, and Japan. This move is part of a tougher vetting process reflecting Washington's push to close export-control loopholes amid a crackdown related to China's chip industry. The information is summarized strictly from the provided source without further elaboration.
summary.zh: 英伟达大幅缩减了在亚洲（包括新加坡、马来西亚和日本）的买家名单。此举为加强审查，响应华盛顿收紧出口管制漏洞，针对中国芯片产业的打压行动。该信息严格依据所提供来源总结。
summary.es: Nvidia ha reducido significativamente su lista de compradores en Asia, incluyendo Singapur, Malasia y Japón. Esta medida forma parte de un proceso de revisión más estricto reflejando el impulso de Washington para cerrar lagunas en el control de exportaciones en medio de la represión relacionada con la industria de chips de China. La información se resume estrictamente de la fuente proporcionada.
