title.original: China’s ex-Politburo member Ma Xingrui’s ‘rampant corruption’ included family
title.en: China’s ex-Politburo member Ma Xingrui’s ‘rampant corruption’ included family
title.zh: 中国前政治局委员马兴瑞“严重腐败”涉及家人
title.es: Exmiembro del Politburó chino Ma Xingrui involucrado en “corrupción rampante” que incluye a su familia

summary.original: Former Politburo member Ma Xingrui, who previously led China's new-generation carrier rocket programme and served as Xinjiang party chief, has been removed from the Communist Party and dismissed from public office following an anti-corruption investigation, according to state broadcaster reports. The Central Commission for Discipline Inspection (CCDI) found that Ma had engaged in 'rampant corruption' involving family members, including improperly accepting gifts and money, helping relatives purchase houses at discounted prices, and involvement in 'power-for-sex and money-for-sex transactions.' The CCDI concluded that Ma 'lost his ideals and beliefs,' abandoned his political conviction, betrayed party principles, and seriously violated party discipline. The Politburo approved the CCDI's report on June 30. Ma is the third Politburo member under investigation during the current term starting in 2022, a development not seen in decades.
summary.en: Former Politburo member Ma Xingrui, who previously led China's new-generation carrier rocket programme and served as Xinjiang party chief, has been removed from the Communist Party and dismissed from public office following an anti-corruption investigation, according to state broadcaster reports. The Central Commission for Discipline Inspection (CCDI) found that Ma had engaged in 'rampant corruption' involving family members, including improperly accepting gifts and money, helping relatives purchase houses at discounted prices, and involvement in 'power-for-sex and money-for-sex transactions.' The CCDI concluded that Ma 'lost his ideals and beliefs,' abandoned his political conviction, betrayed party principles, and seriously violated party discipline. The Politburo approved the CCDI's report on June 30. Ma is the third Politburo member under investigation during the current term starting in 2022, a development not seen in decades.
summary.zh: 前政治局委员马兴瑞，曾领导中国新一代运载火箭项目并任新疆党委书记，因反腐调查被开除党籍和公职。中央纪委发现马兴瑞涉嫌“严重腐败”，包括接受礼金、帮助亲属购房优惠及涉“权色钱”交易。纪委称其丧失理想信念，背弃党纪。此报告于6月30日获政治局批准，马为2022年后第三位被调查的政治局成员，数十年来罕见。
summary.es: Ma Xingrui, exmiembro del Politburó que dirigió el programa de cohetes portadores de nueva generación de China y fue jefe del partido en Xinjiang, ha sido expulsado del Partido Comunista y destituido tras una investigación anticorrupción, según informes oficiales. La Comisión Central para la Inspección Disciplinaria (CCDI) halló que Ma incurrió en “corrupción rampante” que involucró a familiares, aceptando regalos y dinero, ayudando en la compra de viviendas a precio descontado y participando en intercambios de poder por sexo y dinero por sexo. La CCDI concluyó que perdió ideales y convicciones políticas, traicionó principios del partido y violó gravemente la disciplina. El Politburó aprobó este informe el 30 de junio. Ma es el tercer miembro del Politburó bajo investigación desde 2022, algo inédito en décadas.

title.original: US burrito giant Chipotle opening first outlet in Mexico
title.en: US burrito giant Chipotle opening first outlet in Mexico
title.zh: 美国卷饼巨头Chipotle将在墨西哥开设首家门店
title.es: El gigante estadounidense de burritos Chipotle abrirá su primer local en México

summary.original: Chipotle Mexican Grill, a US-based burrito restaurant chain with over 4,100 locations worldwide, is set to open its first outlet in Mexico this week, specifically in Nuevo León near the Texas border. The company describes this as a 'significant milestone' and an important 'proof-of-concept' for appealing to the Mexican market, aiming to respect Mexico's culinary heritage while delivering the Chipotle experience. Plans include further openings in Nuevo León and expansion to Mexico City in 2027 in partnership with Mexican operator Alsea. Reaction on social media has been mixed, with some mocking the decision and questioning why Mexicans would prefer Chipotle over their traditional cuisine. The briefing is source-limited but notes that other US fast food brands like Taco Bell and Domino’s Pizza have struggled to succeed in the countries where their dishes originated.
summary.en: Chipotle Mexican Grill, a US-based burrito restaurant chain with over 4,100 locations worldwide, is set to open its first outlet in Mexico this week, specifically in Nuevo León near the Texas border. The company describes this as a 'significant milestone' and an important 'proof-of-concept' for appealing to the Mexican market, aiming to respect Mexico's culinary heritage while delivering the Chipotle experience. Plans include further openings in Nuevo León and expansion to Mexico City in 2027 in partnership with Mexican operator Alsea. Reaction on social media has been mixed, with some mocking the decision and questioning why Mexicans would prefer Chipotle over their traditional cuisine. The briefing is source-limited but notes that other US fast food brands like Taco Bell and Domino’s Pizza have struggled to succeed in the countries where their dishes originated.
summary.zh: 美国墨西哥卷饼连锁店Chipotle Mexican Grill计划本周在靠近德州边境的新莱昂州开设首家墨西哥门店，公司称此举为“重要里程碑”和面向墨西哥市场的“概念验证”，力图尊重墨西哥烹饪传统的同时提供Chipotle体验。计划还包括新莱昂州更多门店及2027年与墨西哥运营商Alsea合作入驻墨西哥城。社交媒体反应复杂，有人质疑为何墨西哥人会选择Chipotle而非传统菜肴。其他美国快餐品牌如Taco Bell和多米诺比萨也曾在原产国遇挫。
summary.es: Chipotle Mexican Grill, cadena estadounidense de burritos con más de 4,100 locales en el mundo, abrirá esta semana su primer local en México, en Nuevo León cerca de la frontera con Texas. La empresa describe esto como un “hito significativo” y una importante “prueba de concepto” para atraer al mercado mexicano, buscando respetar la herencia culinaria local mientras ofrece la experiencia Chipotle. Los planes incluyen más aperturas en Nuevo León y expansión a Ciudad de México en 2027 con el operador mexicano Alsea. Las reacciones en redes sociales han sido mixtas, con críticas y dudas sobre por qué los mexicanos preferirían Chipotle a su cocina tradicional. Se señala que otras marcas estadounidenses de comida rápida como Taco Bell y Domino’s Pizza han tenido dificultades en los países de origen de sus platos.

title.original: China’s trade surges in first half of 2026, maintaining growth amid global tensions
title.en: China’s trade surges in first half of 2026, maintaining growth amid global tensions
title.zh: 2026年上半年中国贸易激增，在全球紧张局势中保持增长
title.es: El comercio de China se dispara en la primera mitad de 2026, manteniendo el crecimiento pese a tensiones globales

summary.original: China's exports grew by 27% year on year in June 2026, reaching US$412.39 billion, outperforming economists' expectations of 18.5% growth, while imports rose 36% to US$286.76 billion, exceeding projected 24.25% growth. This resulted in a trade surplus of US$125.62 billion, up from US$105.43 billion in May. For the first half of 2026, exports increased 17.6% and imports rose 26.6%. Growth was driven by a boom in technology exports including artificial intelligence products and robotics. Zhang Zhiwei, chief economist at Pinpoint Asset Management, noted that export growth has been a key driver of China's economy and is expected to continue into the second half of the year, demonstrating the competitiveness and resilience of China’s manufacturing sector. The report also mentions that this could increase trade tensions, particularly with Europe.
summary.en: China's exports grew by 27% year on year in June 2026, reaching US$412.39 billion, outperforming economists' expectations of 18.5% growth, while imports rose 36% to US$286.76 billion, exceeding projected 24.25% growth. This resulted in a trade surplus of US$125.62 billion, up from US$105.43 billion in May. For the first half of 2026, exports increased 17.6% and imports rose 26.6%. Growth was driven by a boom in technology exports including artificial intelligence products and robotics. Zhang Zhiwei, chief economist at Pinpoint Asset Management, noted that export growth has been a key driver of China's economy and is expected to continue into the second half of the year, demonstrating the competitiveness and resilience of China’s manufacturing sector. The report also mentions that this could increase trade tensions, particularly with Europe.
summary.zh: 2026年6月中国出口同比增长27%，达到4123.9亿美元，超出经济学家18.5%的预期，进口增长36%至2867.6亿美元，超出预测的24.25%。贸易顺差为1256.2亿美元，高于5月的1054.3亿美元。2026年上半年，出口增长17.6%，进口增长26.6%。增长主要由人工智能和机器人等技术出口推动。平点资产管理首席经济学家张志伟指出，出口增长是中国经济的关键驱动力，预计下半年仍将持续，体现制造业的竞争力与韧性。报告也提到这可能加剧与欧洲的贸易紧张。
summary.es: Las exportaciones de China crecieron un 27% interanual en junio de 2026, alcanzando 412,390 millones de dólares, superando las expectativas de crecimiento del 18.5%, mientras que las importaciones aumentaron un 36% hasta 286,760 millones, superando el previsto 24.25%. Esto produjo un superávit comercial de 125,620 millones de dólares, mayor a los 105,430 millones de mayo. En el primer semestre de 2026, las exportaciones subieron un 17.6% y las importaciones un 26.6%. El crecimiento fue impulsado por un auge en exportaciones tecnológicas como productos de inteligencia artificial y robótica. Zhang Zhiwei, economista jefe de Pinpoint Asset Management, indicó que el crecimiento de las exportaciones ha sido clave para la economía china y se espera que continúe en la segunda mitad del año, demostrando la competitividad y resiliencia del sector manufacturero de China. El informe también menciona que esto podría aumentar las tensiones comerciales, especialmente con Europa.

title.original: Australian police reveal unseen photos 25 years after British backpacker murder
title.en: Australian police reveal unseen photos 25 years after British backpacker murder
title.zh: 澳大利亚警方发布25年前英国背包客谋杀案未公开照片
title.es: Policía australiana revela fotos inéditas 25 años después del asesinato de mochilero británico

summary.original: Australian police have released previously unseen photographs related to the 2001 murder investigation of British backpacker Peter Falconio, whose body has never been found. Falconio was shot near Barrow Creek in the Northern Territory, Australia. The images include a photo of the convicted killer Bradley Murdoch taken during police investigations, as well as photos of Falconio's girlfriend Joanne Lees showing injuries she sustained after being assaulted and bound with cable ties, before escaping. Murdoch died in prison of throat cancer last year without revealing the location of Falconio's remains. The Northern Territory Police Commissioner Martin Dole stated that the investigation remains open and that the release of images is intended to jog public memories or prompt tips. A reward of up to A$500,000 is offered for information leading to the discovery of Falconio's remains. The briefing is source-limited.
summary.en: Australian police have released previously unseen photographs related to the 2001 murder investigation of British backpacker Peter Falconio, whose body has never been found. Falconio was shot near Barrow Creek in the Northern Territory, Australia. The images include a photo of the convicted killer Bradley Murdoch taken during police investigations, as well as photos of Falconio's girlfriend Joanne Lees showing injuries she sustained after being assaulted and bound with cable ties, before escaping. Murdoch died in prison of throat cancer last year without revealing the location of Falconio's remains. The Northern Territory Police Commissioner Martin Dole stated that the investigation remains open and that the release of images is intended to jog public memories or prompt tips. A reward of up to A$500,000 is offered for information leading to the discovery of Falconio's remains. The briefing is source-limited.
summary.zh: 澳大利亚警方公开了2001年英国背包客彼得·法尔科尼谋杀案相关的未公开照片。法尔科尼在澳大利亚北领地巴罗溪附近被枪杀，遗体至今未找到。照片包括罪犯布拉德利·默多克在调查期间的图片，以及女友乔安娜·里斯受伤、被绑缚后逃脱的照片。默多克去年死于狱中喉癌，未透露法尔科尼遗体下落。北领地警察局长马丁·多尔指出调查仍在进行，发布照片是为唤起公众记忆并促使提供线索。悬赏最高达50万澳元寻找法尔科尼遗体。
summary.es: La policía australiana ha publicado fotografías inéditas relacionadas con la investigación del asesinato en 2001 del mochilero británico Peter Falconio, cuyo cuerpo nunca ha sido encontrado. Falconio fue disparado cerca de Barrow Creek, en el Territorio del Norte de Australia. Las imágenes incluyen una foto del asesino condenado Bradley Murdoch tomada durante las investigaciones policiales, así como fotos de la novia de Falconio, Joanne Lees, mostrando las lesiones sufridas tras ser agredida y atada con bridas antes de escapar. Murdoch murió en prisión el año pasado de cáncer de garganta sin revelar la ubicación de los restos de Falconio. El comisionado de policía del Territorio del Norte, Martin Dole, afirmó que la investigación sigue abierta y que la liberación de imágenes busca refrescar la memoria pública o incentivar pistas. Se ofrece una recompensa de hasta 500,000 AUD por información que conduzca al hallazgo de los restos.

title.original: Colombian national killed by ICE agent during operation in Maine
title.en: Colombian national killed by ICE agent during operation in Maine
title.zh: 哥伦比亚籍男子在缅因州执法行动中被ICE特工击毙
title.es: Ciudadano colombiano muere por disparo de agente de ICE durante operación en Maine

summary.original: An Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) agent fatally shot a Colombian national during an enforcement operation in Biddeford, Maine, on Monday 14 July 2026. ICE said the driver tried to flee the scene when agents attempted to stop the vehicle, leading the officer to discharge his weapon due to fears for public safety. The person killed was a 26-year-old Colombian authorized to work in the US, according to the Maine Immigrants' Rights Coalition. The ICE agent involved has been placed on leave pending an investigation by the Department of Homeland Security's inspector general office. The incident follows another fatal ICE shooting in Houston a week earlier. Protests have occurred in Biddeford following the shooting. Senators from Maine have called for a full impartial investigation. Officials are investigating if the use of deadly force was necessary; involved officers did not wear body cameras. This briefing is source-limited to the details in the provided evidence.
summary.en: An Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) agent fatally shot a Colombian national during an enforcement operation in Biddeford, Maine, on Monday 14 July 2026. ICE said the driver tried to flee the scene when agents attempted to stop the vehicle, leading the officer to discharge his weapon due to fears for public safety. The person killed was a 26-year-old Colombian authorized to work in the US, according to the Maine Immigrants' Rights Coalition. The ICE agent involved has been placed on leave pending an investigation by the Department of Homeland Security's inspector general office. The incident follows another fatal ICE shooting in Houston a week earlier. Protests have occurred in Biddeford following the shooting. Senators from Maine have called for a full impartial investigation. Officials are investigating if the use of deadly force was necessary; involved officers did not wear body cameras. This briefing is source-limited to the details in the provided evidence.
summary.zh: 2026年7月14日，移民与海关执法局（ICE）特工在缅因州比德福德执法行动中击毙一名企图逃逸的26岁哥伦比亚公民，该人士获准在美工作。ICE表示因担忧公众安全，特工开枪。涉事特工已被停职，国土安全部监察长办公室正调查此案。此事件发生在一周前休斯顿ICE致命开枪事件之后。比德福德爆发抗议，缅因州参议员呼吁全面公正调查。警方使用致命武力的必要性在调查中，涉事特工无执法摄像头。该简报仅根据所给信息整理。
summary.es: El lunes 14 de julio de 2026, un agente de Inmigración y Control de Aduanas (ICE) disparó y mató a un ciudadano colombiano de 26 años durante una operación en Biddeford, Maine, cuando el conductor intentó huir. ICE explicó que el agente disparó por temor a la seguridad pública. La persona fallecida estaba autorizada para trabajar en EE.UU., según la Coalición por los Derechos de los Inmigrantes de Maine. El agente involucrado fue suspendido y la Oficina del Inspector General del Departamento de Seguridad Nacional investiga el incidente. Sucedió tras otro tiroteo fatal de ICE en Houston hace una semana. Se produjeron protestas en Biddeford y senadores de Maine pidieron una investigación imparcial. Se evalúa la justificación del uso de fuerza letal; los agentes no usaban cámaras corporales. Esta información está limitada a la evidencia proporcionada.

title.original: Identity of Sydney daycare worker facing 329 child abuse offences revealed
title.en: Identity of Sydney daycare worker facing 329 child abuse offences revealed
title.zh: 悉尼托儿所工作人员涉329项虐童罪名身份曝光
title.es: Revelan identidad de trabajador de guardería en Sídney acusado de 329 delitos de abuso infantil

summary.original: Hamish Tait, a 35-year-old Sydney childcare worker, faces 329 charges related to alleged abuse of 136 children across five childcare centres over 16 years. Arrested in July last year, his identity was revealed only after a police court order was lifted to aid victim identification and family contact. Charges include producing child abuse material and filming private acts without consent. Tait worked at or attended 62 education facilities between 2009 and 2025, primarily in Sydney's north-west, including his own private business. Police have contacted 121 families but are still identifying 22 victims. The Australian Federal Police highlighted the severity due to Tait's position of trust. The case is part of a series of childcare abuse allegations in Australia.
summary.en: Hamish Tait, a 35-year-old Sydney childcare worker, faces 329 charges related to alleged abuse of 136 children across five childcare centres over 16 years. Arrested in July last year, his identity was revealed only after a police court order was lifted to aid victim identification and family contact. Charges include producing child abuse material and filming private acts without consent. Tait worked at or attended 62 education facilities between 2009 and 2025, primarily in Sydney's north-west, including his own private business. Police have contacted 121 families but are still identifying 22 victims. The Australian Federal Police highlighted the severity due to Tait's position of trust. The case is part of a series of childcare abuse allegations in Australia.
summary.zh: 35岁的悉尼托儿所工作人员哈米什·泰特面临329项指控，涉及过去16年在五家托儿所虐待136名儿童。去年7月被捕，身份在撤销警方禁令后公布，以帮助受害者识别和家属联系。指控包括制作儿童虐待材料和未经同意拍摄私人行为。泰特曾在2009至2025年间涉及62个教育机构，主要在悉尼西北部，包括其私营业务。警方已联系121个家庭，仍在确认22名受害儿童。澳大利亚联邦警察强调其信任职位加重案情。此案是澳大利亚多起托儿所虐待事件之一。
summary.es: Hamish Tait, un trabajador de guardería de 35 años en Sídney, enfrenta 329 cargos relacionados con presunto abuso a 136 niños en cinco centros infantiles durante 16 años. Fue arrestado en julio del año pasado y su identidad se reveló tras levantar una orden judicial para facilitar la identificación de víctimas y contacto con sus familias. Los cargos incluyen producción de material de abuso infantil y grabación de actos privados sin consentimiento. Tait trabajó o asistió a 62 instituciones educativas entre 2009 y 2025, principalmente en el noroeste de Sídney, incluyendo su propio negocio privado. La policía contactó a 121 familias y sigue identificando a 22 víctimas. La Policía Federal Australiana destacó la gravedad dada la posición de confianza de Tait. El caso forma parte de una serie de denuncias de abuso en guarderías en Australia.

title.original: Graham’s Death Complicates G.O.P. Agenda in Congress
title.en: Graham’s Death Complicates G.O.P. Agenda in Congress
title.zh: 格雷厄姆之死使共和党国会议程复杂化
title.es: La muerte de Graham complica la agenda del Partido Republicano en el Congreso

summary.original: Senators returned to the Capitol mourning the death of their colleague Lindsey Graham, who had pivotal roles on multiple issues confronting lawmakers. The New York Times article suggests his death complicates the GOP agenda in Congress.
summary.en: Senators returned to the Capitol mourning the death of their colleague Lindsey Graham, who had pivotal roles on multiple issues confronting lawmakers. The New York Times article suggests his death complicates the GOP agenda in Congress.
summary.zh: 参议员们回到国会山悼念同僚林赛·格雷厄姆的去世，他在多项关键议题中扮演重要角色。《纽约时报》的文章指出，他的去世使共和党的国会议程变得复杂。
summary.es: Los senadores regresaron al Capitolio lamentando la muerte de su colega Lindsey Graham, quien tenía roles clave en varios temas que enfrentaban los legisladores. El artículo del New York Times sugiere que su fallecimiento complica la agenda republicana en el Congreso.

title.original: Oil hits one-month high as US, Iran step up attacks in Strait of Hormuz
title.en: Oil hits one-month high as US, Iran step up attacks in Strait of Hormuz
title.zh: 美国与伊朗加强霍尔木兹海峡攻击，油价创一个月新高
title.es: El petróleo alcanza un máximo de un mes mientras EE. UU. e Irán intensifican ataques en el Estrecho de Ormuz

summary.original: Oil prices reached a one-month high as the United States and Iran intensified attacks in the Strait of Hormuz, Reuters reports. This escalation contributed to rising oil market tensions on the date of the article.
summary.en: Oil prices reached a one-month high as the United States and Iran intensified attacks in the Strait of Hormuz, Reuters reports. This escalation contributed to rising oil market tensions on the date of the article.
summary.zh: 据路透社报道，美国和伊朗加剧了在霍尔木兹海峡的攻击，油价因此达到一个月来的高点。这一升级导致当天油市压力增加。
summary.es: Los precios del petróleo alcanzaron un máximo de un mes debido a que Estados Unidos e Irán intensificaron los ataques en el Estrecho de Ormuz, informa Reuters. Esta escalada contribuyó a aumentar las tensiones en el mercado petrolero en la fecha del artículo.

title.original: Paramount CEO David Ellison Backing Bipartisan Federal Film Tax Incentive
title.en: Paramount CEO David Ellison Backing Bipartisan Federal Film Tax Incentive
title.zh: 派拉蒙CEO大卫·埃利森支持两党联邦电影税收激励
title.es: David Ellison, CEO de Paramount, apoya un incentivo fiscal federal para películas bipartidista

summary.original: Paramount Skydance CEO David Ellison has been backing a bipartisan bill to establish a federal film tax incentive, spending at least six months in exploratory meetings regarding the legislation. He was present at a Washington, D.C. meeting with top Republican leadership where the matter was discussed, according to Variety sources.
summary.en: Paramount Skydance CEO David Ellison has been backing a bipartisan bill to establish a federal film tax incentive, spending at least six months in exploratory meetings regarding the legislation. He was present at a Washington, D.C. meeting with top Republican leadership where the matter was discussed, according to Variety sources.
summary.zh: 派拉蒙Skydance首席执行官大卫·埃利森支持一项建立联邦电影税收激励的两党法案，至少花费六个月时间参与相关立法的探讨。据Variety消息，他出席了在华盛顿特区与顶级共和党领导人讨论此事的会议。
summary.es: David Ellison, CEO de Paramount Skydance, ha estado respaldando un proyecto bipartidista para establecer un incentivo fiscal federal para películas, dedicando al menos seis meses a reuniones exploratorias sobre la legislación. Según fuentes de Variety, estuvo presente en una reunión en Washington D.C. con líderes republicanos donde se discutió el tema.

title.original: Trump Says Fighting With Iran Has Resumed as He Orders Blockade and Tolls
title.en: Trump Says Fighting With Iran Has Resumed as He Orders Blockade and Tolls
title.zh: 特朗普称与伊朗战斗已恢复，命令封锁和征收通行费
title.es: Trump dice que ha reanudado la lucha con Irán y ordena bloqueos y peajes

summary.original: According to The New York Times, after several days of strikes, President Trump notified Congress that fighting with Iran had resumed. He also announced shipping fees that his administration had previously deemed illegal, indicating a new blockade and tolls.
summary.en: According to The New York Times, after several days of strikes, President Trump notified Congress that fighting with Iran had resumed. He also announced shipping fees that his administration had previously deemed illegal, indicating a new blockade and tolls.
summary.zh: 据《纽约时报》报道，经过数日袭击后，特朗普总统通知国会与伊朗的战斗已恢复。同时，他宣布了之前被其政府认定为非法的运输费用，表明实施新封锁和通行费。
summary.es: Según The New York Times, tras varios días de ataques, el presidente Trump notificó al Congreso que la lucha con Irán se había reanudado. También anunció tarifas de envío que su administración había considerado ilegales anteriormente, indicando un nuevo bloqueo y peajes.

title.original: ‘Kong x Godzilla’ Ride Set to Open at Korea’s Lotte World This Month: It’s ‘Extremely Immersive’ (EXCLUSIVE)
title.en: ‘Kong x Godzilla’ Ride Set to Open at Korea’s Lotte World This Month: It’s ‘Extremely Immersive’ (EXCLUSIVE)
title.zh: 《金刚大战哥斯拉》主题游乐设施本月将在韩国乐天世界开幕：极具沉浸感（独家）
title.es: La atracción 'Kong x Godzilla' abrirá este mes en Lotte World de Corea: es 'extremadamente inmersiva' (EXCLUSIVO)

summary.original: Legendary Entertainment is opening its first theme park attraction, 'Kong x Godzilla,' at Lotte World in Seoul on July 24. James Ngo, Legendary's executive vice president of franchise management, explained that the project had been a priority for years and involved a lengthy development and construction process. The ride is described as 'extremely immersive' by Variety.
summary.en: Legendary Entertainment is opening its first theme park attraction, 'Kong x Godzilla,' at Lotte World in Seoul on July 24. James Ngo, Legendary's executive vice president of franchise management, explained that the project had been a priority for years and involved a lengthy development and construction process. The ride is described as 'extremely immersive' by Variety.
summary.zh: 传奇娱乐将于7月24日在首尔乐天世界推出首个主题公园项目《金刚大战哥斯拉》。传奇执行副总裁詹姆斯·吴透露该项目筹备多年，开发与建设历时甚久。该游乐设施被《Variety》描述为“极具沉浸感”。
summary.es: Legendary Entertainment abrirá su primera atracción de parque temático, 'Kong x Godzilla', en Lotte World en Seúl el 24 de julio. James Ngo, vicepresidente ejecutivo de gestión de franquicias de Legendary, explicó que el proyecto ha sido una prioridad durante años e implicó un largo proceso de desarrollo y construcción. La atracción es descrita como 'extremadamente inmersiva' por Variety.

title.original: Dollar risks rising but Plaza Accord-style coordination not feasible now: ex-IMF adviser
title.en: Dollar risks rising but Plaza Accord-style coordination not feasible now: ex-IMF adviser
title.zh: 美元风险上升，但现阶段不可能进行广场协议式协调：前国际货币基金组织顾问
title.es: El dólar enfrenta riesgos crecientes pero la coordinación al estilo del Acuerdo de Plaza no es factible ahora: exconsejero del FMI

summary.original: Barry Eichengreen, an economic historian and former senior policy adviser at the International Monetary Fund, said that coordination like the Plaza Accord of 1985 is not feasible now as central banks focus on domestic goals. He noted the current dollar-centred monetary system faces growing concerns and risks, including US fiscal debt, threats to Federal Reserve independence, financial deregulation, tariffs, and weakening geopolitical alliances. Eichengreen suggested that if current policies continue, the chance of a US dollar crisis could exceed 50%. He favors a more multipolar international monetary system aligning with today's global economy, but said its transition would be difficult to coordinate given differing policy mandates among central banks. This summary is based solely on the provided article text.
summary.en: Barry Eichengreen, an economic historian and former senior policy adviser at the International Monetary Fund, said that coordination like the Plaza Accord of 1985 is not feasible now as central banks focus on domestic goals. He noted the current dollar-centred monetary system faces growing concerns and risks, including US fiscal debt, threats to Federal Reserve independence, financial deregulation, tariffs, and weakening geopolitical alliances. Eichengreen suggested that if current policies continue, the chance of a US dollar crisis could exceed 50%. He favors a more multipolar international monetary system aligning with today's global economy, but said its transition would be difficult to coordinate given differing policy mandates among central banks. This summary is based solely on the provided article text.
summary.zh: 经济历史学家暨前国际货币基金组织高级政策顾问巴里·艾肯格林表示，鉴于各国央行注重国内目标，目前无法实现类似1985年广场协议的协调。他指出美元主导的货币体系面临美国财政债务、联储独立性威胁、金融放松监管、关税及地缘政治联盟减弱等风险。若现行政策持续，美元危机几率或超50%。他支持更符合全球经济的多极国际货币体系，但因央行政策差异，转型难以协调。摘要基于提供的文章内容。
summary.es: Barry Eichengreen, historiador económico y exasesor senior del FMI, afirmó que la coordinación como el Acuerdo de Plaza de 1985 no es viable ahora debido a que los bancos centrales se enfocan en objetivos internos. Señaló que el sistema monetario centrado en el dólar enfrenta crecientes riesgos, incluyendo deuda fiscal de EE.UU., amenazas a la independencia de la Reserva Federal, desregulación financiera, aranceles y debilitamiento de alianzas geopolíticas. Si continúan las políticas actuales, la probabilidad de una crisis del dólar podría superar el 50%. Apoya un sistema monetario internacional más multipolar acorde con la economía global actual, aunque su transición sería difícil de coordinar dadas las diferencias de mandato de los bancos centrales. Este resumen se basa únicamente en el texto proporcionado.

title.original: Brazil's top court bars Senator Flavio Bolsonaro from visiting father until vote
title.en: Brazil's top court bars Senator Flavio Bolsonaro from visiting father until vote
title.zh: 巴西最高法院禁止参议员弗拉维奥·博尔索纳罗投票前探视其父亲
title.es: La Corte Suprema de Brasil prohíbe al senador Flavio Bolsonaro visitar a su padre hasta la votación

summary.original: The evidence is limited and provides only the headline that Brazil's top court has barred Senator Flavio Bolsonaro from visiting his father until a vote. No further details are supplied in the provided text.
summary.en: The evidence is limited and provides only the headline that Brazil's top court has barred Senator Flavio Bolsonaro from visiting his father until a vote. No further details are supplied in the provided text.
summary.zh: 证据有限，仅表明巴西最高法院禁止参议员弗拉维奥·博尔索纳罗在投票前探望其父亲，文中无进一步详情。
summary.es: La evidencia es limitada y solo indica que la Corte Suprema de Brasil ha prohibido al senador Flavio Bolsonaro visitar a su padre hasta que se realice una votación, sin más detalles en el texto proporcionado.

title.original: Trump Sharply Cuts the Size of Two National Monuments in Utah
title.en: Trump Sharply Cuts the Size of Two National Monuments in Utah
title.zh: 特朗普大幅缩减犹他州两处国家纪念地规模
title.es: Trump reduce drásticamente el tamaño de dos monumentos nacionales en Utah

summary.original: President Trump sharply reduced the size of two national monuments in Utah: Bears Ears and Grand Staircase-Escalante. The move has drawn opposition from Native American tribes and environmental groups, who are expected to challenge the decision. This summary is based on the available information from the article excerpt provided.
summary.en: President Trump sharply reduced the size of two national monuments in Utah: Bears Ears and Grand Staircase-Escalante. The move has drawn opposition from Native American tribes and environmental groups, who are expected to challenge the decision. This summary is based on the available information from the article excerpt provided.
summary.zh: 特朗普总统大幅缩减犹他州贝尔斯耳和大阶梯-埃斯卡兰特两处国家纪念地面积，遭美洲原住民部落及环保组织反对，预计将面临法律挑战。摘要基于已提供信息。
summary.es: El presidente Trump redujo significativamente el tamaño de dos monumentos nacionales en Utah: Bears Ears y Grand Staircase-Escalante. La medida ha provocado oposición de tribus nativas americanas y grupos ambientales, quienes probablemente impugnen la decisión. Este resumen se basa en la información disponible del artículo.

title.original: Lindsey Graham’s Sister Appointed to Finish His Senate Term After Trump’s Backing
title.en: Lindsey Graham’s Sister Appointed to Finish His Senate Term After Trump’s Backing
title.zh: 林赛·格雷厄姆去世后其妹妹获任参议院剩余任期
title.es: Hermana de Lindsey Graham nombrada para completar su mandato en el Senado tras respaldo de Trump

summary.original: Governor Henry McMaster of South Carolina appointed Darline Graham Nordone, the sister of Lindsay Graham, to complete his Senate term following his death. The appointment occurred after Donald Trump's backing. This summary is grounded in the details given in the provided evidence.
summary.en: Governor Henry McMaster of South Carolina appointed Darline Graham Nordone, the sister of Lindsay Graham, to complete his Senate term following his death. The appointment occurred after Donald Trump's backing. This summary is grounded in the details given in the provided evidence.
summary.zh: 南卡罗来纳州州长亨利·麦克马斯特任命林赛·格雷厄姆的妹妹达琳·格雷厄姆·诺登完成其参议院任期，此任命获得特朗普支持。总结基于所提供证据中的细节。
summary.es: El gobernador de Carolina del Sur, Henry McMaster, nombró a Darline Graham Nordone, hermana de Lindsey Graham, para completar su mandato en el Senado tras su fallecimiento. El nombramiento contó con el respaldo del Donald Trump. Este resumen se basa en los detalles proporcionados en la evidencia suministrada.

title.original: Yemen's Houthis strike Saudi Arabia's Abha airport with missiles and drones in a sharp escalation
title.en: Yemen's Houthis strike Saudi Arabia's Abha airport with missiles and drones in a sharp escalation
title.zh: 也门胡塞武装用导弹和无人机袭击沙特阿卜哈机场，冲突急剧升级
title.es: Los hutíes de Yemen atacan el aeropuerto Abha de Arabia Saudita con misiles y drones en una escalada aguda

summary.original: The AP News article reports that Yemen's Houthi forces executed a missile and drone assault targeting the Abha airport in Saudi Arabia, describing the attack as a significant escalation of conflict.
summary.en: The AP News article reports that Yemen's Houthi forces executed a missile and drone assault targeting the Abha airport in Saudi Arabia, describing the attack as a significant escalation of conflict.
summary.zh: 美联社报道也门胡塞武装对沙特阿卜哈机场发动导弹和无人机袭击，称此举为冲突的重大升级。
summary.es: El artículo de AP News informa que las fuerzas hutíes de Yemen ejecutaron un ataque con misiles y drones contra el aeropuerto Abha en Arabia Saudita, describiendo el ataque como una escalada importante del conflicto.

title.original: California leads lawsuit to block Paramount Warner Bros mega merger
title.en: California leads lawsuit to block Paramount Warner Bros mega merger
title.zh: 加州牵头诉讼阻止百亿美元级派拉蒙华纳合并案
title.es: California lidera demanda para bloquear mega fusión de Paramount y Warner Bros

summary.original: Twelve US states, led by California, have filed a lawsuit to block the $110 billion merger between Warner Bros. and Paramount. The states argue the merger would stifle competition, raise consumer prices, and harm audiences nationwide. Together with Disney, Universal, and Sony, the merged company would control over 86% of the major film release market. California Attorney General Rob Bonta claimed the merger would reduce bargaining power for theaters and TV networks, leading to higher fees passed on to consumers. Paramount has been based in California for over 100 years, and reports say its CEO was urged to move operations out of the state. Paramount described the lawsuit as flawed and warned delays would harm entertainment workers. The US Department of Justice had approved the merger previously, but the coalition has requested a judicial review.
summary.en: Twelve US states, led by California, have filed a lawsuit to block the $110 billion merger between Warner Bros. and Paramount. The states argue the merger would stifle competition, raise consumer prices, and harm audiences nationwide. Together with Disney, Universal, and Sony, the merged company would control over 86% of the major film release market. California Attorney General Rob Bonta claimed the merger would reduce bargaining power for theaters and TV networks, leading to higher fees passed on to consumers. Paramount has been based in California for over 100 years, and reports say its CEO was urged to move operations out of the state. Paramount described the lawsuit as flawed and warned delays would harm entertainment workers. The US Department of Justice had approved the merger previously, but the coalition has requested a judicial review.
summary.zh: 以加州为首的12个美国州提出诉讼，阻止价值1100亿美元的华纳兄弟和派拉蒙合并案，称该合并将削弱竞争、推高价格，损害全国观众。合并后公司将与迪士尼、环球和索尼一起控制超过86%的主要电影发行市场。加州总检察长罗布·邦塔称，合并将减少影院和电视网络的议价能力，导致消费者承担更高费用。派拉蒙在加州已有100多年历史，CEO曾被劝离开该州。派拉蒙称诉讼有缺陷，延迟对娱乐工作者有害。美国司法部曾批准合并，但联盟已请求司法审查。
summary.es: Doce estados de EE.UU., encabezados por California, han presentado una demanda para bloquear la fusión de 110,000 millones de dólares entre Warner Bros. y Paramount. Argumentan que la fusión sofocaría la competencia, aumentaría los precios para consumidores y perjudicaría a las audiencias en todo el país. Junto con Disney, Universal y Sony, la empresa fusionada controlaría más del 86% del mercado principal de estrenos cinematográficos. El fiscal general de California, Rob Bonta, afirmó que la fusión reduciría el poder de negociación de cines y cadenas de TV, trasladando mayores costos a los consumidores. Paramount, con más de 100 años en California, reporta que su CEO fue instado a trasladar operaciones fuera del estado. Paramount calificó la demanda de errónea y advirtió que retrasos afectarían a trabajadores del entretenimiento. El Departamento de Justicia de EE.UU. aprobó previamente la fusión, pero la coalición solicitó una revisión judicial.

title.original: Judge Denounces Trump’s I.R.S. Suit as Improper Exercise in Self-Dealing
title.en: Judge Denounces Trump’s I.R.S. Suit as Improper Exercise in Self-Dealing
title.zh: 法官谴责特朗普对国税局诉讼为不当自利行为
title.es: Juez condena demanda de Trump contra el IRS como ejercicio impropio de interés propio

summary.original: A judge criticized Donald Trump's lawsuit against the Internal Revenue Service, describing it as an improper act of self-dealing. The judge also recommended disciplinary measures against the lawyers involved in the case, including the acting attorney general, Todd Blanche. The summary is based strictly on the supplied evidence.
summary.en: A judge criticized Donald Trump's lawsuit against the Internal Revenue Service, describing it as an improper act of self-dealing. The judge also recommended disciplinary measures against the lawyers involved in the case, including the acting attorney general, Todd Blanche. The summary is based strictly on the supplied evidence.
summary.zh: 一名法官批评特朗普对国税局的诉讼为不当的自利行为，并建议对包括代理总检察长托德·布兰奇在内的涉案律师进行纪律处分。摘要严格基于所提供证据。
summary.es: Un juez criticó la demanda de Donald Trump contra el Servicio de Impuestos Internos, calificándola como un acto impropio de interés propio. El juez también recomendó medidas disciplinarias contra los abogados involucrados, incluyendo al fiscal general interino Todd Blanche. El resumen se basa estrictamente en la evidencia proporcionada.

title.original: SK Hynix plunges after Nasdaq debut as memory chip euphoria cools
title.en: SK Hynix plunges after Nasdaq debut as memory chip euphoria cools
title.zh: SK海力士纳斯达克首秀后股价暴跌，存储芯片热潮降温
title.es: SK Hynix cae tras debut en Nasdaq mientras se enfría el entusiasmo por chips de memoria

summary.original: Following its debut on the Nasdaq stock exchange, SK Hynix experienced a sharp drop in its share price amid cooling enthusiasm for memory chip stocks. Further details are limited in the provided evidence.
summary.en: Following its debut on the Nasdaq stock exchange, SK Hynix experienced a sharp drop in its share price amid cooling enthusiasm for memory chip stocks. Further details are limited in the provided evidence.
summary.zh: 纳斯达克首秀后，SK海力士股价急剧下跌，因存储芯片股票热情降温。提供的证据中详情有限。
summary.es: Tras su debut en la bolsa Nasdaq, SK Hynix experimentó una fuerte caída en su precio de acciones ante el enfriamiento del entusiasmo por las acciones de chips de memoria. Los detalles adicionales son limitados en la evidencia proporcionada.

title.original: Is tracking your food purchases good for your health?
title.en: Is tracking your food purchases good for your health?
title.zh: 追踪你的食品购买记录对健康有益吗？
title.es: ¿Es bueno para tu salud rastrear tus compras de alimentos?

summary.original: The BBC Business report explores the growing popularity of food tracking apps like Yuka, which enables users to scan product barcodes to assess nutritional quality and additives, assisting shoppers in making healthier choices. Yuka, founded in France and now with a global user base, uses a traffic light rating system and also incorporates France's Nutri-Score labeling. The app's CEO states that revenue comes from paid users rather than advertising or sponsorship. Experts note that while helpful, such apps mainly affect more privileged consumers with time to engage in food choices. There is evidence from a company survey that many users alter purchasing based on app ratings. French supermarket Intermarché has reportedly reformulated own-brand products influenced by such transparency initiatives. The summary reflects the content in the evidence provided.
summary.en: The BBC Business report explores the growing popularity of food tracking apps like Yuka, which enables users to scan product barcodes to assess nutritional quality and additives, assisting shoppers in making healthier choices. Yuka, founded in France and now with a global user base, uses a traffic light rating system and also incorporates France's Nutri-Score labeling. The app's CEO states that revenue comes from paid users rather than advertising or sponsorship. Experts note that while helpful, such apps mainly affect more privileged consumers with time to engage in food choices. There is evidence from a company survey that many users alter purchasing based on app ratings. French supermarket Intermarché has reportedly reformulated own-brand products influenced by such transparency initiatives. The summary reflects the content in the evidence provided.
summary.zh: BBC商务报道探讨了食品追踪应用如Yuka的流行，这类应用允许用户扫码条码了解营养质量和添加剂，帮助消费者做出更健康选择。Yuka起源法国，用户遍布全球，采用红黄绿灯评级与法国Nutri-Score标识。该应用收入来自付费用户，无广告或赞助。专家指出此类应用主要影响有时间和资源的优越消费者。一项公司调查显示许多用户根据评级调整购买。法国超市Intermarché据称也因透明度倡议调整自有品牌产品。摘要基于提供的内容。
summary.es: El informe de BBC Business explora la creciente popularidad de aplicaciones de seguimiento de alimentos como Yuka, que permite a los usuarios escanear códigos de barras para evaluar calidad nutricional y aditivos, ayudando a elegir opciones más saludables. Yuka, fundada en Francia y con usuarios globales, usa un sistema de semáforo y también incorpora la etiqueta Nutri-Score francesa. El CEO indica que los ingresos provienen de usuarios pagos, no de publicidad o patrocinio. Expertos señalan que estas apps afectan principalmente a consumidores privilegiados con tiempo para elegir alimentos. Una encuesta muestra que muchos usuarios cambian sus compras según las calificaciones. El supermercado francés Intermarché ha reformulado productos propios influido por estas iniciativas de transparencia. El resumen refleja el contenido presentado.

title.original: 'I don't want to seem tight': How much should you give to the year-end teacher collection?
title.en: 'I don't want to seem tight': How much should you give to the year-end teacher collection?
title.zh: “我不想显得吝啬”：年终给老师收礼该给多少？
title.es: «No quiero parecer tacaño»: ¿Cuánto deberías aportar para la colecta de fin de año para el maestro?

summary.original: The BBC Business article discusses the common practice among parents to contribute money for year-end teacher gifts, highlighting the pressures and etiquette surrounding these collections. It describes how the demands can be substantial, with one case of a collection reaching £560 for a class of 30 children, averaging over £18 per child for teachers and assistants. The reporting notes differing opinions on Mumsnet forums, where some parents find the amounts excessive and feel pressured, while others defend generosity given teachers' pay. Organizers aim for fixed contributions, often around £5-£10 per staff member, to ease financial strain and avoid social tension. Psychologists consulted suggest class-wide fixed contributions reduce anxiety and 'showing-off' culture, with emphasis on collective cards and gifts rather than individual giving. Teachers value personal notes from students over costly presents. Schools typically limit gift value and discourage cash gifts. The briefing is based entirely on the evidence provided by the BBC article.
summary.en: The BBC Business article discusses the common practice among parents to contribute money for year-end teacher gifts, highlighting the pressures and etiquette surrounding these collections. It describes how the demands can be substantial, with one case of a collection reaching £560 for a class of 30 children, averaging over £18 per child for teachers and assistants. The reporting notes differing opinions on Mumsnet forums, where some parents find the amounts excessive and feel pressured, while others defend generosity given teachers' pay. Organizers aim for fixed contributions, often around £5-£10 per staff member, to ease financial strain and avoid social tension. Psychologists consulted suggest class-wide fixed contributions reduce anxiety and 'showing-off' culture, with emphasis on collective cards and gifts rather than individual giving. Teachers value personal notes from students over costly presents. Schools typically limit gift value and discourage cash gifts. The briefing is based entirely on the evidence provided by the BBC article.
summary.zh: BBC报道探讨了家长为年终老师送礼募款的普遍做法，指出金额压力及礼仪。案例中30人班级募得560英镑，平均每人超18英镑。论坛里意见分歧，有人认为金额过高且有压力，有人支持基于教师薪资的慷慨。组织者通常设定固定金额约5-10英镑以减轻负担并避免社交紧张。心理学家建议统一金额减轻焦虑，重在集体贺卡而非个人礼物，老师更重视学生亲笔便条。学校一般限制礼物价值，反现金礼。总结基于BBC文章内容。
summary.es: El artículo de BBC analiza la práctica común entre padres de contribuir para regalos de fin de año a los maestros, destacando presiones y etiquetas. Un caso alcanzó £560 para 30 niños, más de £18 por niño para maestros y asistentes. En foros de Mumsnet hay opiniones divididas: algunos consideran las cantidades excesivas y sienten presión, otros defienden la generosidad dada la paga docente. Los organizadores buscan contribuciones fijas, normalmente £5-£10 por miembro del personal, para aliviar la carga financiera y evitar tensiones sociales. Psicólogos recomiendan aportes fijos para toda la clase para reducir ansiedad y competencia, enfatizando tarjetas y regalos colectivos en vez de individuales. Los maestros valoran notas personales sobre regalos costosos. Las escuelas suelen limitar el valor y desaconsejan regalos en efectivo. Resumen basado únicamente en el informe de BBC.

title.original: The secretive crypto firm backed by Farage's biggest donor
title.en: The secretive crypto firm backed by Farage's biggest donor
title.zh: 法雷奇最大捐助者支持的神秘加密公司
title.es: La enigmática firma cripto respaldada por el mayor donante de Farage

summary.original: The BBC Business article profiles the cryptocurrency company Tether, noting it is the world's largest stablecoin issuer and a major buyer of gold, reportedly more than any country in 2025 according to European Central Bank data. Tether holds significant US government debt and is described as operating like a private central bank with around 200 employees. Importantly, Christopher Harborne, a major Tether shareholder, gave large donations totaling £15 million to Nigel Farage's Reform party, with all donations declared. Nigel Farage has advocated for the UK to embrace cryptocurrency innovation and had a July 2025 meeting with Bank of England Governor Andrew Bailey discussing crypto regulation. Farage's party drafted but later removed a bill concerning crypto-assets and stablecoins. The article raises questions about possible influence but notes Reform denies any connection between donations and policy. The Bank of England relaxed some proposed stablecoin restrictions recently. This briefing is limited to the information supplied by the BBC report.
summary.en: The BBC Business article profiles the cryptocurrency company Tether, noting it is the world's largest stablecoin issuer and a major buyer of gold, reportedly more than any country in 2025 according to European Central Bank data. Tether holds significant US government debt and is described as operating like a private central bank with around 200 employees. Importantly, Christopher Harborne, a major Tether shareholder, gave large donations totaling £15 million to Nigel Farage's Reform party, with all donations declared. Nigel Farage has advocated for the UK to embrace cryptocurrency innovation and had a July 2025 meeting with Bank of England Governor Andrew Bailey discussing crypto regulation. Farage's party drafted but later removed a bill concerning crypto-assets and stablecoins. The article raises questions about possible influence but notes Reform denies any connection between donations and policy. The Bank of England relaxed some proposed stablecoin restrictions recently. This briefing is limited to the information supplied by the BBC report.
summary.zh: BBC文章介绍了加密货币公司Tether，全球最大稳定币发行商和黄金买家，持有大量美国政府债务，运作类似私人央行。重要股东哈伯恩向法雷奇改革党捐款1500万英镑，均已申报。法雷奇曾推动英国拥抱加密创新，并于2025年7月与英格兰银行行长讨论监管。改革党曾起草但撤回加密资产相关法案。文章疑及潜在影响，改革党否认捐款与政策相关。英格兰银行近期放宽部分稳定币限制。该摘要仅基于BBC资料。
summary.es: El artículo de BBC presenta a Tether, la mayor emisora de stablecoins del mundo y principal compradora de oro, con gran deuda del gobierno estadounidense, operando como un banco central privado. Christopher Harborne, accionista importante, donó £15 millones al partido Reform de Nigel Farage, todas declaradas. Farage ha abogado por la innovación cripto en Reino Unido y se reunió en julio de 2025 con el gobernador del Banco de Inglaterra para discutir regulación. El partido Reform redactó pero luego retiró una ley sobre criptoactivos y stablecoins. El artículo plantea dudas sobre influencias posibles, aunque Reform niega relación entre donaciones y políticas. Recientemente, el Banco de Inglaterra suavizó ciertas restricciones para stablecoins. Resumen basado únicamente en el informe de BBC.

title.original: Trump’s Strait of Hormuz Fee Could Double the Cost of Shipping
title.en: Trump’s Strait of Hormuz Fee Could Double the Cost of Shipping
title.zh: 特朗普霍尔木兹海峡费或将使运输成本翻倍
title.es: La tarifa de Trump para el Estrecho de Hormuz podría duplicar el costo del transporte

summary.original: The evidence is thin as the New York Times article mainly has metadata with no article text provided. The headline indicates that a proposed 20 percent fee by Donald Trump on shipping through the Strait of Hormuz could potentially double shipping costs for oil and other goods, stirring concern among shippers. Further details are not available in the source.
summary.en: The evidence is thin as the New York Times article mainly has metadata with no article text provided. The headline indicates that a proposed 20 percent fee by Donald Trump on shipping through the Strait of Hormuz could potentially double shipping costs for oil and other goods, stirring concern among shippers. Further details are not available in the source.
summary.zh: 纽约时报文章元数据有限，标题表明特朗普提议对霍尔木兹海峡运输征收20%费用，可能导致油品及货物运输成本翻倍，引起航运业担忧。无其他细节。
summary.es: El artículo del New York Times carece de texto completo, pero el titular indica que la tarifa propuesta por Donald Trump del 20% para el transporte por el Estrecho de Hormuz podría duplicar los costos de envío de petróleo y otros bienes, causando preocupación entre transportistas. No hay más detalles disponibles.

title.original: Daytime Emmys Announce 2026 Nominations (UPDATING)
title.en: Daytime Emmys Announce 2026 Nominations (UPDATING)
title.zh: 2026年日间艾美奖提名公布（持续更新）
title.es: Anuncian nominaciones a los Daytime Emmys 2026 (ACTUALIZANDO)

summary.original: The 53rd annual Daytime Emmy nominations have been announced. Early nominees include recently ended talk shows "The Kelly Clarkson Show" and "Sherri," both receiving nods for talk series and talk host categories. The Daytime Emmys, administered by the National Academy of Television Arts & Sciences based in New York, recognize daytime dramas, talk series, entertainment news, culinary, adventure, instructional, and legal programming. Details about the Lifetime Achievement honoree, Gold & Silver Circle inductees, and ceremony host will be revealed later.
summary.en: The 53rd annual Daytime Emmy nominations have been announced. Early nominees include recently ended talk shows "The Kelly Clarkson Show" and "Sherri," both receiving nods for talk series and talk host categories. The Daytime Emmys, administered by the National Academy of Television Arts & Sciences based in New York, recognize daytime dramas, talk series, entertainment news, culinary, adventure, instructional, and legal programming. Details about the Lifetime Achievement honoree, Gold & Silver Circle inductees, and ceremony host will be revealed later.
summary.zh: 第53届日间艾美奖提名公布。早期提名包括刚结束的脱口秀《凯莉·克拉克森秀》和《谢瑞》，两者均获脱口秀系列和主持人类别提名。日间艾美奖由纽约国家电视艺术与科学学院管理，表彰日间剧集、脱口秀、娱乐新闻、美食、冒险、教学和法律节目。终身成就奖、金银圈入选者和典礼主持人详情稍后公布。
summary.es: Se han anunciado las nominaciones para la 53ª edición anual de los Daytime Emmy. Entre los primeros nominados se encuentran los programas recientemente finalizados "The Kelly Clarkson Show" y "Sherri", ambos nominados en categorías de serie y presentador de programas de charla. Los Daytime Emmy, gestionados por la Academia Nacional de Artes y Ciencias de la Televisión en Nueva York, reconocen dramas diurnos, programas de charla, noticias de entretenimiento, culinaria, aventura, educativos y legales. Los detalles sobre el homenajeado por Logro de Toda una Vida, los inductores al Círculo de Oro y Plata, y el anfitrión de la ceremonia serán revelados próximamente.

title.original: ‘Cats: The Jellicle Ball’ Ending Broadway Run in August
title.en: ‘Cats: The Jellicle Ball’ Ending Broadway Run in August
title.zh: 《猫：杰利克尔之舞》将于八月结束百老汇演出
title.es: ‘Cats: The Jellicle Ball’ terminará su temporada en Broadway en agosto

summary.original: According to Variety, the musical revival 'Cats: The Jellicle Ball' will end its Broadway run early, with a final performance scheduled for August 8 after roughly five months since previews began in March 2026. Despite receiving positive reviews, decent ticket sales, and winning three Tony Awards—including best direction, choreography, and costumes—the production will close early. Notably, costume designer Qween Jean's win marked the first time an openly trans woman won Broadway’s highest honor. The show had reimagined T.S. Eliot’s work in an 1980s ballroom dance setting highlighting underground drag culture and the AIDS crisis. This summary relies exclusively on Variety's report.
summary.en: According to Variety, the musical revival 'Cats: The Jellicle Ball' will end its Broadway run early, with a final performance scheduled for August 8 after roughly five months since previews began in March 2026. Despite receiving positive reviews, decent ticket sales, and winning three Tony Awards—including best direction, choreography, and costumes—the production will close early. Notably, costume designer Qween Jean's win marked the first time an openly trans woman won Broadway’s highest honor. The show had reimagined T.S. Eliot’s work in an 1980s ballroom dance setting highlighting underground drag culture and the AIDS crisis. This summary relies exclusively on Variety's report.
summary.zh: 据Variety，音乐剧复排《猫：杰利克尔之舞》将提前结束百老汇演出，最终场定于2026年8月8日，距2026年3月预演开始约五个月。尽管获得积极评价、票房良好并获三项托尼奖（最佳导演、编舞及服装设计），仍选择关闭。服装设计师Qween Jean获奖，成为首位公开跨性别女性托尼最佳服装得主。该剧以1980年代舞厅舞蹈场景重新演绎T.S.艾略特作品，聚焦地下变装文化与艾滋危机。摘要基于Variety。
summary.es: Según Variety, el musical revival «Cats: The Jellicle Ball» finalizará su temporada en Broadway antes de lo previsto, con función final el 8 de agosto de 2026, tras unos cinco meses desde el inicio de previews en marzo. A pesar de críticas positivas, buenas ventas y tres premios Tony (mejor dirección, coreografía y vestuario), cerrará temprano. La diseñadora de vestuario Qween Jean fue la primera mujer transgénero en ganar el máximo honor de Broadway. La obra reimaginó la obra de T.S. Eliot en un escenario de baile de salón de los 80, destacando la cultura drag underground y la crisis del SIDA. Resumen basado exclusivamente en Variety.

title.original: UAE says Iranian missiles struck oil tankers in Strait of Hormuz, one sailor killed
title.en: UAE says Iranian missiles struck oil tankers in Strait of Hormuz, one sailor killed
title.zh: 阿联酋称伊朗导弹袭击霍尔木兹海峡油轮致一水手死亡
title.es: EAU afirma que misiles iraníes impactaron petroleros en el Estrecho de Hormuz, un marinero fallecido

summary.original: Reuters reports that the United Arab Emirates stated Iranian missiles struck oil tankers in the Strait of Hormuz, resulting in the death of one sailor. The briefing is source-limited as no further details are provided in the evidence.

title.original: Hudson Williams Confronts Autograph Hounds Who Followed Him Home in Viral Video: ‘Please F—ing Leave’
title.en: Hudson Williams Confronts Autograph Hounds Who Followed Him Home in Viral Video: ‘Please F—ing Leave’
title.zh: 哈德森·威廉姆斯在病毒视频中面对跟踪至家门要求签名的粉丝：‘请滚开’
title.es: Hudson Williams enfrenta a fanáticos que lo siguieron a casa para pedir autógrafos en video viral: ‘Por favor, lárguense’

summary.original: Hudson Williams, star of "Heated Rivalry," confronted fans who followed him to his Paris residence seeking autographs. A video shared on social media shows Williams clearly upset, telling the group their behavior was "really creepy" and asking them to leave. He attempted to burn the photos they offered but was unsuccessful. The residence is a temporary apartment while Williams is in Paris. Fans expressed support for Williams, emphasizing celebrities' rights to privacy. Previously, Williams and co-star François Arnaud criticized fans for hateful comments toward cast members, urging respect.
summary.en: Hudson Williams, star of "Heated Rivalry," confronted fans who followed him to his Paris residence seeking autographs. A video shared on social media shows Williams clearly upset, telling the group their behavior was "really creepy" and asking them to leave. He attempted to burn the photos they offered but was unsuccessful. The residence is a temporary apartment while Williams is in Paris. Fans expressed support for Williams, emphasizing celebrities' rights to privacy. Previously, Williams and co-star François Arnaud criticized fans for hateful comments toward cast members, urging respect.
summary.zh: 《激烈对抗》明星哈德森·威廉姆斯在巴黎住所被粉丝跟踪索要签名，他对粉丝行为表示不满，称其“非常诡异”，并要求离开。威廉姆斯试图烧掉粉丝递来的照片未果。粉丝支持其隐私权。此前，威廉姆斯与合演者弗朗索瓦·阿诺对粉丝针对演员的恶意评论提出批评，呼吁尊重。
summary.es: Hudson Williams, estrella de "Heated Rivalry", enfrentó a fanáticos que lo siguieron hasta su residencia en París buscando autógrafos. En un video viral, Williams muestra molestia, calificando su comportamiento como "realmente espeluznante" y pidiendo que se vayan. Intentó quemar las fotos que le ofrecieron sin éxito. Los fans expresaron apoyo resaltando el derecho a la privacidad de los famosos. Anteriormente, Williams y su coestrella François Arnaud criticaron comentarios odiosos hacia el elenco, pidiendo respeto.

title.original: Todd Blanche’s War Against Journalism
title.en: Todd Blanche’s War Against Journalism
title.zh: 托德·布兰奇对新闻业的战争
title.es: La guerra de Todd Blanche contra el periodismo

summary.original: According to The Atlantic, Todd Blanche, acting U.S. attorney general, is preparing for confirmation hearings following a 100-day period as acting attorney general. During this time, the Justice Department has issued subpoenas to reporters from various outlets including The New York Times and The Washington Post, seeking testimony on how they obtained sensitive information. These actions have been criticized as a form of intimidation towards journalists who reported on issues that have upset President Trump. Blanche has publicly defended the DOJ's priority to prosecute leakers who share classified information with reporters. The article suggests that these moves could pose risks to free speech and press freedom.
summary.en: According to The Atlantic, Todd Blanche, acting U.S. attorney general, is preparing for confirmation hearings following a 100-day period as acting attorney general. During this time, the Justice Department has issued subpoenas to reporters from various outlets including The New York Times and The Washington Post, seeking testimony on how they obtained sensitive information. These actions have been criticized as a form of intimidation towards journalists who reported on issues that have upset President Trump. Blanche has publicly defended the DOJ's priority to prosecute leakers who share classified information with reporters. The article suggests that these moves could pose risks to free speech and press freedom.
summary.zh: 据《大西洋》报道，代理美国司法部长托德·布兰奇在任职期间发出传票，要求多家媒体记者就敏感信息来源作证，此举被批评为恐吓新闻界，并可能威胁言论和新闻自由。布兰奇公开支持起诉泄密者。
summary.es: The Atlantic informa que Todd Blanche, fiscal general interino, ha emitido citaciones a reporteros para revelar fuentes de información sensible, acción criticada como intimidación a la prensa y posible amenaza a la libertad de expresión. Blanche defiende la persecución de filtradores.

title.en: Trump's HHS abandons threat to withhold Medicare and Medicaid funding over trans care

summary.original: NPR News reports that the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) under Donald Trump has decided not to finalize its previously proposed measures to withhold Medicare and Medicaid funding related to gender-affirming care for youth. This decision abandons the administration's most aggressive attempt to end such care nationally. The evidence does not include further details or context, so the summary reflects the key points available.
summary.en: NPR News reports that the Department of Health and Human Services (HHS) under Donald Trump has decided not to finalize its previously proposed measures to withhold Medicare and Medicaid funding related to gender-affirming care for youth. The evidence does not include further details or context, so the summary reflects the key points available.

title.original: South Carolina's governor names Lindsey Graham's sister to serve out his term
title.en: South Carolina's governor names Lindsey Graham's sister to serve out his term
title.zh: 南卡州州长任命林赛·格雷厄姆的妹妹完成其议员任期
title.es: El gobernador de Carolina del Sur nombra a la hermana de Lindsey Graham para completar su mandato

summary.original: NPR News reports that South Carolina's governor, Henry McMaster, has appointed Darline Graham Nordone to complete the term of her late brother, Senator Lindsey Graham, who died in office. The appointment will last a few months as a special primary election is scheduled for August 11 to select candidates for the full term beginning next year. Darline Graham’s intention to seek a full Senate term is currently unclear. Prominent Republicans such as President Trump and Senator Tim Scott have expressed support for the appointment. The evidence further notes the close relationship between the Graham siblings and mentions potential senatorial candidates in South Carolina. This summary is based on substantial evidence provided.
summary.en: NPR News reports that South Carolina's governor, Henry McMaster, has appointed Darline Graham Nordone to complete the term of her late brother, Senator Lindsey Graham, who died in office. The appointment will last a few months as a special primary election is scheduled for August 11 to select candidates for the full term beginning next year. Darline Graham’s intention to seek a full Senate term is currently unclear. Prominent Republicans such as President Trump and Senator Tim Scott have expressed support for the appointment. The evidence further notes the close relationship between the Graham siblings and mentions potential senatorial candidates in South Carolina. This summary is based on substantial evidence provided.
summary.zh: NPR报道，南卡罗来纳州州长亨利·麦克马斯特任命达琳·格雷厄姆·诺尔登完成其已故兄弟参议员林赛·格雷厄姆的任期。任命将持续数月，8月11日将举行特别初选以选出下一届候选人。达琳是否竞选完整任期尚不明朗。特朗普总统和参议员蒂姆·斯科特等共和党人支持该任命。
summary.es: NPR informa que el gobernador de Carolina del Sur, Henry McMaster, nombró a Darline Graham Nordone para completar el mandato de su hermano fallecido, el senador Lindsey Graham. El nombramiento durará unos meses, ya que se celebrará una primaria especial el 11 de agosto para elegir candidatos para el mandato completo que comienza el próximo año. No está claro si Darline Graham buscará un mandato completo. Destacados republicanos como el presidente Trump y el senador Tim Scott apoyan el nombramiento.

title.original: US judge voids Donald Trump's $1.8bn settlement with IRS that gave him immunity from tax audits
title.en: US judge voids Donald Trump's $1.8bn settlement with IRS that gave him immunity from tax audits
title.zh: 美国法官宣告特朗普与国税局18亿美元和解协议无效，撤除免税审查权
title.es: Juez estadounidense anula el acuerdo de $1.8 mil millones de Donald Trump con el IRS que le otorgaba inmunidad a auditorías fiscales

summary.original: BBC World reports that a U.S. federal judge has voided a $1.8 billion settlement agreement between President Donald Trump and the IRS, which had granted Trump immunity from tax audits. The judge concluded that the lawsuit was filed for improper purposes and referred one of Trump's attorneys for possible disciplinary action. The decision prevents Trump and associated parties from invoking the settlement in future legal cases and may allow the IRS to pursue audits of Trump's tax filings. The original lawsuit involved allegations of leaked private tax information, and the now-abandoned settlement had included the creation of an "anti-weaponisation" fund to compensate individuals claiming government targeting. The article provides detailed information on the case and reactions from involved parties.
summary.en: BBC World reports that a U.S. federal judge has voided a $1.8 billion settlement agreement between President Donald Trump and the IRS, which had granted Trump immunity from tax audits. The judge concluded that the lawsuit was filed for improper purposes and referred one of Trump's attorneys for possible disciplinary action. The decision prevents Trump and associated parties from invoking the settlement in future legal cases and may allow the IRS to pursue audits of Trump's tax filings. The original lawsuit involved allegations of leaked private tax information, and the now-abandoned settlement had included the creation of an "anti-weaponisation" fund to compensate individuals claiming government targeting. The article provides detailed information on the case and reactions from involved parties.
summary.zh: BBC报道，美国联邦法官宣布特朗普与国税局签订的18亿美元和解协议无效，该协议曾赋予特朗普免受税务审查的权利。法官认为诉讼存在不正当目的，并建议对特朗普一名律师采取纪律措施。此决定阻止特朗普及相关方在未来法律案件中援引该和解，且可能让国税局重新审计其纳税申报。
summary.es: BBC informa que un juez federal de EE.UU. anuló un acuerdo de $1.8 mil millones entre el presidente Donald Trump y el IRS, que le otorgaba inmunidad contra auditorías fiscales. El juez concluyó que la demanda se presentó por motivos indebidos y refirió a uno de los abogados de Trump para posible acción disciplinaria. La decisión impide que Trump y asociados invoquen el acuerdo en futuros casos y podría permitir al IRS llevar a cabo auditorías de sus declaraciones fiscales.
