title.es: Precios del Café Arábica Alcanzan Récord por Disputa Arancelaria entre EE.UU. y Colombia

summary.original: An article from the Wall Street Journal titled 'Arabica Coffee Prices Hit Record on U.S., Colombia Tariff Spat' reports that the price of Arabica coffee has reached a record high. This follows market reactions to the withdrawal of President Trump's threats to impose tariffs and economic sanctions on Colombia. The summary is source-limited since the evidence does not provide further economic context or market impact details.
summary.en: An article from the Wall Street Journal titled 'Arabica Coffee Prices Hit Record on U.S., Colombia Tariff Spat' reports that the price of Arabica coffee has reached a record high. This follows market reactions to the withdrawal of President Trump's threats to impose tariffs and economic sanctions on Colombia. The summary is source-limited since the evidence does not provide further economic context or market impact details.
summary.zh: 《华尔街日报》报道称，因特朗普威胁对哥伦比亚加征关税后撤，阿拉比卡咖啡价格创新高。证据未提供更多经济背景或市场影响细节。
summary.es: El artículo reporta que los precios del café Arábica alcanzaron un máximo histórico tras la retirada de amenazas arancelarias del presidente Trump hacia Colombia, sin mayor contexto económico o impacto de mercado adicional.

title.original: Freed Israeli Hostages Still Had Shrapnel in Their Bodies From Oct. 7 Attack
title.en: Freed Israeli Hostages Still Had Shrapnel in Their Bodies From Oct. 7 Attack
title.zh: 获释以色列人质体内仍留有10月7日袭击的弹片
title.es: Rehenes Israelíes Liberados Aún Tenían Esquirlas en Sus Cuerpos Tras Ataque del 7 de Octubre

summary.original: The Wall Street Journal article 'Freed Israeli Hostages Still Had Shrapnel in Their Bodies From Oct. 7 Attack' reports that some women who were held captive for eight months in tunnels after the October 7 attack still carried shrapnel in their bodies. An Israeli medical official noted that some of these women were held alone for extended periods. The briefing is source-limited as the evidence is focused on these medical observations without additional context.
summary.en: The Wall Street Journal article 'Freed Israeli Hostages Still Had Shrapnel in Their Bodies From Oct. 7 Attack' reports that some women who were held captive for eight months in tunnels after the October 7 attack still carried shrapnel in their bodies. An Israeli medical official noted that some of these women were held alone for extended periods. The briefing is source-limited as the evidence is focused on these medical observations without additional context.
summary.zh: 《华尔街日报》报道，部分被囚禁八个月的女性人质体内仍存弹片，部分还长时间单独被关。证据集中于医疗观察，无更多背景信息。
summary.es: El artículo indica que algunas mujeres israelíes liberadas tras ocho meses de cautiverio aún presentan esquirlas en sus cuerpos, y algunas estuvieron aisladas largos periodos. La información se limita a observaciones médicas sin contexto adicional.

title.original: Suspected Sabotage of Deep-Sea Cable Triggers First NATO-Led Response
title.en: Suspected Sabotage of Deep-Sea Cable Triggers First NATO-Led Response
title.zh: 深海电缆疑遭破坏引发北约首次主导应对
title.es: Sospecha de Sabotaje en Cable Submarino Provoca Primera Respuesta Liderada por la OTAN

summary.original: The Wall Street Journal article 'Suspected Sabotage of Deep-Sea Cable Triggers First NATO-Led Response' explains that NATO has initiated its first coordinated response to a suspected sabotage campaign targeting critical infrastructure. This reaction came after a deep-sea cable was severed in the Baltic Sea. The summary is source-limited as the evidence does not elaborate on the nature of the sabotage or further NATO measures.
summary.en: The Wall Street Journal article 'Suspected Sabotage of Deep-Sea Cable Triggers First NATO-Led Response' explains that NATO has initiated its first coordinated response to a suspected sabotage campaign targeting critical infrastructure. This reaction came after a deep-sea cable was severed in the Baltic Sea. The summary is source-limited as the evidence does not elaborate on the nature of the sabotage or further NATO measures.
summary.zh: 《华尔街日报》报道，北约对波罗的海深海电缆被切断事件启动首个协调反应，针对疑似关键基础设施破坏。证据未详细说明破坏性质及后续措施。
summary.es: NATO ha lanzado su primera respuesta coordinada ante sospechas de sabotaje en un cable submarino en el Mar Báltico, afectando infraestructura crítica. No se amplían detalles sobre la sabotaje o acciones subsecuentes.

title.original: Rwanda-Backed Rebels Enter Congo's Safe-Haven City
title.en: Rwanda-Backed Rebels Enter Congo's Safe-Haven City
title.zh: 卢旺达支持的反叛武装进入刚果避难城市
title.es: Rebeldes respaldados por Ruanda entran en ciudad santuario del Congo

summary.original: According to the Wall Street Journal article, residents of the Congolese city of Goma reported gunfire and shelling after rebels backed by Rwanda overran Congolese troops. United Nations officials estimated that more than one million displaced people were present inside the city, which serves as a safe haven and aid hub. This information is based on the article's details about recent conflict developments and population displacement in Goma.
summary.en: According to the Wall Street Journal article, residents of the Congolese city of Goma reported gunfire and shelling after rebels backed by Rwanda overran Congolese troops. United Nations officials estimated that more than one million displaced people were present inside the city, which serves as a safe haven and aid hub. This information is based on the article's details about recent conflict developments and population displacement in Goma.
summary.zh: 刚果市民报告称，卢旺达支持的反叛武装击溃刚果军队后发生枪击和炮击。联合国估计该避难城市内有超过一百万流离失所者，该市亦为援助中心。
summary.es: Residentes de Goma reportaron disparos y bombardeos tras la llegada de rebeldes respaldados por Ruanda que superaron a las tropas congoleñas. La ONU estima más de un millón de desplazados en esta ciudad santuario y centro de ayuda.

title.original: Swiss franc, Japanese yen Rise as DeepSeek News Boosts Safe Havens
title.en: Swiss franc, Japanese yen Rise as DeepSeek News Boosts Safe Havens
title.zh: 瑞士法郎、日元走强，DeepSeek新闻推动避险货币
title.es: Franco suizo y yen japonés suben mientras DeepSeek impulsa refugios seguros

summary.original: The Wall Street Journal reports that the Swiss franc and Japanese yen strengthened against the U.S. dollar as investors sought safe-haven currencies. This movement came after the launch of a new AI model by Chinese startup DeepSeek, which affected U.S. technology stocks. The episode title and existing summary suggest a connection between AI developments and shifts in currency markets.
summary.en: The Wall Street Journal reports that the Swiss franc and Japanese yen strengthened against the U.S. dollar as investors sought safe-haven currencies. This movement came after the launch of a new AI model by Chinese startup DeepSeek, which affected U.S. technology stocks. The episode title and existing summary suggest a connection between AI developments and shifts in currency markets.
summary.zh: 据华尔街日报报道，瑞郎和日元兑美元走强，因投资者寻求避险货币。此举源于中国初创企业DeepSeek发布AI新模型，影响美国科技股。
summary.es: El Wall Street Journal informa que el franco suizo y el yen japonés se fortalecieron frente al dólar debido a que inversores buscan monedas refugio tras el lanzamiento de un modelo de IA de la startup china DeepSeek, que afectó a las acciones tecnológicas de EE.UU.

title.original: Cocaine-Funded Gangs Shake Colombia Years After Peace Pact
title.en: Cocaine-Funded Gangs Shake Colombia Years After Peace Pact
title.zh: 可卡因资助的帮派震撼哥伦比亚协议签订多年后
title.es: Bandas financiadas por cocaína sacuden Colombia años después del pacto de paz

summary.original: A Wall Street Journal World article describes ongoing attacks by cocaine-funded militias against civilians in Colombia. These events occur eight years after a peace accord removed a powerful rebel group from the area. The article suggests that these attacks reflect the Colombian state's inaction since the peace pact. This summary is based directly on the article's description without additional inference.
summary.en: A Wall Street Journal World article describes ongoing attacks by cocaine-funded militias against civilians in Colombia. These events occur eight years after a peace accord removed a powerful rebel group from the area. The article suggests that these attacks reflect the Colombian state's inaction since the peace pact. This summary is based directly on the article's description without additional inference.
summary.zh: 华尔街日报世界报道描述哥伦比亚遭受由可卡因资助的民兵持续攻击。这些事件发生在和平协议解除一强大反叛组织后八年，反映出政府未采取有效行动。
summary.es: Un artículo del Wall Street Journal describe ataques continuos de milicias financiadas por cocaína contra civiles en Colombia, ocho años tras un acuerdo de paz que eliminó a un grupo rebelde fuerte, mostrando la inacción estatal.

sections.description: AI research, products, and infrastructure signals.

title.original: India’s Antitrust Body Fines HP $13.3 Million for Cartelizing
title.en: India’s Antitrust Body Fines HP $13.3 Million for Cartelizing
title.zh: 印度反垄断机构罚款惠普1330万美元 因涉嫌串通
title.es: El organismo antimonopolio de India multa a HP con 13.3 millones de dólares por cartelización

summary.original: India’s antitrust regulator fined the Indian unit of HP Inc. 1.27 billion rupees ($13.3 million), saying the company colluded with its resellers to rig prices in government procurement tenders.
summary.en: India’s antitrust regulator fined the Indian unit of HP Inc. 1.27 billion rupees ($13.3 million), saying the company colluded with its resellers to rig prices in government procurement tenders.
summary.zh: 印度反垄断监管机构对惠普印度分公司罚款12.7亿卢比（1330万美元），指控其与经销商串通操纵政府采购招标价格。
summary.es: El regulador antimonopolio de India multó a la unidad india de HP Inc. con 1.27 mil millones de rupias (13.3 millones de dólares) por coludirse con sus revendedores y confeccionar precios en licitaciones gubernamentales.

title.original: Ericsson Earnings Fall as Kit Maker Faces Rising Costs
title.en: Ericsson Earnings Fall as Kit Maker Faces Rising Costs
title.zh: 爱立信盈利下降，设备制造商面临成本上升压力
title.es: Las ganancias de Ericsson caen ante el aumento de costos para el fabricante de equipos

summary.original: Ericsson AB reported earnings that fell in line with analysts’ forecasts in the second quarter, as the Swedish telecommunications faces rising component costs.
summary.en: Ericsson AB reported earnings that fell in line with analysts’ forecasts in the second quarter, as the Swedish telecommunications faces rising component costs.
summary.zh: 爱立信公布第二季度盈利符合分析师预期，瑞典电信公司面临组件成本上升的挑战。
summary.es: Ericsson AB reportó ganancias en el segundo trimestre en línea con las previsiones de los analistas, mientras enfrenta costos crecientes de componentes.

title.original: Pure DC Building Finland AI Data Center, Secures Microsoft Deal
title.en: Pure DC Building Finland AI Data Center, Secures Microsoft Deal
title.zh: Pure DC在芬兰建设AI数据中心，赢得微软合作
title.es: Pure DC construye centro de datos de IA en Finlandia y asegura acuerdo con Microsoft

summary.original: Oaktree Capital Management-backed UK firm Pure Data Centres is building a data center in Finland that clients including Microsoft Corp. are slated to use, part of a broader effort to ramp up the digital infrastructure necessary for Europe to build and run more artificial intelligent systems.
summary.en: Oaktree Capital Management-backed UK firm Pure Data Centres is building a data center in Finland that clients including Microsoft Corp. are slated to use, part of a broader effort to ramp up the digital infrastructure necessary for Europe to build and run more artificial intelligent systems.
summary.zh: 由Oaktree Capital Management支持的英国公司Pure Data Centres正在芬兰建设数据中心，微软等客户将使用，助力欧洲扩大支持人工智能系统的数字基础设施。
summary.es: La empresa británica Pure Data Centres, respaldada por Oaktree Capital Management, construye un centro de datos en Finlandia que clientes como Microsoft utilizarán, parte de un esfuerzo para fortalecer la infraestructura digital para IA en Europa.

title.original: Bank of Singapore Global CIO on Market Outlook
title.en: Bank of Singapore Global CIO on Market Outlook
title.zh: 新加坡银行全球首席投资官谈市场展望
title.es: CIO global del Banco de Singapur sobre perspectivas del mercado

summary.original: Jean Chia, Global CIO at Bank of Singapore, discusses her outlook for equity markets and the broader investment environment. She speaks with Shery Ahn on the sidelines of the Bank of Singapore CIO Summit in Hong Kong on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade". (Source: Bloomberg)
summary.en: Jean Chia, Global CIO at Bank of Singapore, discusses her outlook for equity markets and the broader investment environment. She speaks with Shery Ahn on the sidelines of the Bank of Singapore CIO Summit in Hong Kong on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade". (Source: Bloomberg)
summary.zh: 新加坡银行全球首席投资官Jean Chia在香港新加坡银行CIO峰会期间接受Shery Ahn采访，讨论股票市场及投资环境展望。（来源：彭博）
summary.es: Jean Chia, CIO global del Banco de Singapur, analiza perspectivas del mercado de acciones y el entorno de inversión en entrevista con Shery Ahn durante la Cumbre CIO del banco en Hong Kong. (Fuente: Bloomberg)

title.original: Moonfare Assets Top €4 Billion as PE Platform Draws Rich Clients
title.en: Moonfare Assets Top €4 Billion as PE Platform Draws Rich Clients
title.zh: Moonfare资产管理规模突破40亿欧元，私募平台吸引富裕客户
title.es: Los activos de Moonfare superan los 4 mil millones de euros mientras la plataforma de PE atrae clientes ricos

summary.original: Moonfare’s assets under management topped €4 billion ($4.6 billion) after the private markets investing platform continued to attract inflows from wealthy individuals and family offices.
summary.en: Moonfare’s assets under management topped €4 billion ($4.6 billion) after the private markets investing platform continued to attract inflows from wealthy individuals and family offices.
summary.zh: Moonfare的管理资产规模超过40亿欧元（46亿美元），该私募市场投资平台继续吸引富裕个人和家族办公室的资金流入。
summary.es: Los activos bajo gestión de Moonfare superaron los 4 mil millones de euros (4.6 mil millones de dólares) después de que la plataforma de inversión en mercados privados continuara atrayendo entradas de capital de individuos adinerados y oficinas familiares.

title.original: Huawei, Apple Get Boost in China From Memory Costs, IDC Says
title.en: Huawei, Apple Get Boost in China From Memory Costs, IDC Says
title.zh: IDC称华为和苹果因内存成本受益于中国市场
title.es: Huawei y Apple impulsados en China por crisis de memorias, dice IDC

summary.original: Huawei Technologies Co. and Apple Inc. extended their lead atop China’s smartphone market in the June quarter, expanding their shipments as consumers opted to either buy premium devices or skip upgrades, according to IDC.
summary.en: Huawei Technologies Co. and Apple Inc. extended their lead atop China’s smartphone market in the June quarter, expanding their shipments as consumers opted to either buy premium devices or skip upgrades, according to IDC.
summary.zh: 据IDC报道，华为和苹果在中国智能手机市场份额扩大，推动原因是消费者选择购买高端机型或推迟升级，导致出货量增长。
summary.es: Huawei y Apple aumentaron su liderazgo en el mercado chino de smartphones en el segundo trimestre, ampliando envíos mientras consumidores optan por dispositivos premium o posponer actualizaciones, según IDC.

title.original: OpenAI Is Showing Kalshi’s World Cup Odds in ChatGPT
title.en: OpenAI Is Showing Kalshi’s World Cup Odds in ChatGPT
title.zh: OpenAI在ChatGPT中展示Kalshi的世界杯赔率
title.es: OpenAI muestra las probabilidades de la Copa Mundial de Kalshi en ChatGPT

summary.original: The partnership, a first of its kind for the artificial intelligence company, will use the prediction market’s data to power some search results about the soccer tournament.
summary.en: The partnership, a first of its kind for the artificial intelligence company, will use the prediction market’s data to power some search results about the soccer tournament.
summary.zh: 这是人工智能公司首次此类合作，利用预测市场的数据为部分关于足球锦标赛的搜索结果提供支持。
summary.es: La colaboración, primera en su tipo para la compañía de inteligencia artificial, utilizará los datos del mercado de predicciones para alimentar algunos resultados de búsqueda sobre el torneo de fútbol.

title.original: Already rich, already successful, why the last wave of tech winners is grinding again
title.en: Already rich, already successful, why the last wave of tech winners is grinding again
title.zh: 已富有已成功，为什么最后一批科技赢家再次奋战
title.es: Ya ricos, ya exitosos, por qué la última ola de ganadores tecnológicos está esforzándose de nuevo

summary.original: They're rolling up their sleeves again, seemingly out of fear of missing AI's defining moment and, presumably, the irresistible allure of making even more money -- potentially a lot more.
summary.en: They're rolling up their sleeves again, seemingly out of fear of missing AI's defining moment and, presumably, the irresistible allure of making even more money -- potentially a lot more.
summary.zh: 他们又开始努力了，似乎是害怕错过人工智能的决定性时刻，也可能是被赚取更多——甚至大量更多——财富的诱惑所驱使。
summary.es: Están volviendo a arremangarse, aparentemente por miedo a perder el momento definitorio de la IA y, presumiblemente, por el irresistible atractivo de ganar aún más dinero, posiblemente mucho más.

title.original: Chinese AI labs to challenge Thinking Machines Lab with new industry focus
title.en: Chinese AI labs to challenge Thinking Machines Lab with new industry focus
title.zh: 中国AI实验室聚焦新产业，挑战Thinking Machines Lab
title.es: Laboratorios de IA chinos desafían a Thinking Machines Lab con nuevo enfoque industrial

summary.original: Two former Chinese AI lab leaders said they aim to challenge Thinking Machines Lab, a US start-up founded by ex-OpenAI executive Mira Murati, and focus on building industry-specific artificial intelligence solutions and models following their exit from the fierce frontier AI race. “All models are relentlessly chasing the ceiling of general intelligence … but in many real-world scenarios, we don’t necessarily need an…
summary.en: Two former Chinese AI lab leaders said they aim to challenge Thinking Machines Lab, a US start-up founded by ex-OpenAI executive Mira Murati, and focus on building industry-specific artificial intelligence solutions and models following their exit from the fierce frontier AI race. “All models are relentlessly chasing the ceiling of general intelligence … but in many real-world scenarios, we don’t necessarily need an…
summary.zh: 两位中国前AI实验室领导者表示，退出激烈的前沿AI竞争后，他们将挑战由前OpenAI高管Mira Murati创立的美国初创公司Thinking Machines Lab，专注于构建行业特定的人工智能解决方案和模型。他们认为，“所有模型都一味追求通用智能的极限……但许多实际场景未必需要如此”。
summary.es: Dos exlíderes de laboratorios de IA chinos dijeron que tras salir de la feroz carrera de IA de punta, apuntan a desafiar a Thinking Machines Lab, una startup estadounidense fundada por la exejecutiva de OpenAI Mira Murati, y enfocarse en construir soluciones y modelos de inteligencia artificial específicos para la industria. "Todos los modelos persiguen incansablemente el techo de la inteligencia general... pero en muchos escenarios reales no es estrictamente necesario..."

title.original: SK Hynix Shares Rebound After Early Rout as AI Jitters Persist
title.en: SK Hynix Shares Rebound After Early Rout as AI Jitters Persist
title.zh: SK海力士股价经历震荡后反弹，AI市场担忧持续
title.es: Las acciones de SK Hynix se recuperan tras caída inicial en medio de nerviosismo por IA

summary.original: SK Hynix Inc. erased an early plunge to climb more than 2% in Seoul on Tuesday, underscoring the extreme volatility gripping one of the world’s biggest beneficiaries of the artificial intelligence boom.
summary.en: SK Hynix Inc. erased an early plunge to climb more than 2% in Seoul on Tuesday, underscoring the extreme volatility gripping one of the world’s biggest beneficiaries of the artificial intelligence boom.
summary.zh: SK海力士股价在首尔周二抹去早盘跌幅，上涨超过2%，显示市场对这家人工智能受益巨头的极端波动性。
summary.es: Las acciones de SK Hynix Inc. borraron una caída inicial para subir más del 2% en Seúl el martes, evidenciando la alta volatilidad que afecta a uno de los mayores beneficiarios del auge de la inteligencia artificial.

title.original: Uber’s product chief on hotels, robotaxis, and why the company doesn’t want to be “everything for everyone”
title.en: Uber’s product chief on hotels, robotaxis, and why the company doesn’t want to be “everything for everyone”
title.zh: Uber产品主管谈酒店、机器人出租车及公司为何不想成为“面面俱到”的存在
title.es: El jefe de producto de Uber sobre hoteles, robotaxis y por qué la empresa no quiere ser “todo para todos”

summary.original: Uber Chief Product Officer Sachin Kansal walks TechCrunch through the company's financial-services ambitions, its increasingly complicated relationship with Waymo, its new AV Labs data operation, and how AI is starting to show up in ways riders and drivers will actually notice.
summary.en: Uber Chief Product Officer Sachin Kansal walks TechCrunch through the company's financial-services ambitions, its increasingly complicated relationship with Waymo, its new AV Labs data operation, and how AI is starting to show up in ways riders and drivers will actually notice.
summary.zh: Uber首席产品官Sachin Kansal向TechCrunch介绍了公司在金融服务领域的野心、与Waymo日益复杂的关系、新的AV Labs数据运营，以及人工智能如何开始以乘客和司机能感知的方式出现。
summary.es: El director de producto de Uber, Sachin Kansal, explicó a TechCrunch las ambiciones del empresa en servicios financieros, su relación cada vez más compleja con Waymo, su nueva operación de datos AV Labs, y cómo la IA empieza a manifestarse de formas que pasajeros y conductores realmente notarán.

summary.en: OpenAI's Codex and ChatGPT product lead committed publicly that GPT-5.6 Sol will remain in all paid ChatGPT subscriptions — Plus, Pro, Go, Team, and Edu — and is not being swapped for a weaker model. A follow-up update noted that inference optimizations have landed and cost savings are being passed to subscribers. At 10K+ likes, this was the day's most-engaged OpenAI communication: no nerfing, only better economics. OpenAI 的 Codex 和 ChatGPT 产品负责人公开承诺，GPT-5.6 Sol 将继续包含在所有付费 ChatGPT 订阅中——Plus、Pro、Go、Team 和 Edu——不会被更…
summary.zh: OpenAI的Codex和ChatGPT产品负责人公开承诺，GPT-5.6 Sol将继续包含在所有付费ChatGPT订阅中——Plus、Pro、Go、Team和Edu——不会被更弱模型替代。后续更新提到已优化推理并将成本节省转给订阅者。该消息获得超1万点赞，是当天关注度最高的OpenAI通告。
summary.es: El líder de producto de Codex y ChatGPT de OpenAI se comprometió públicamente a que GPT-5.6 Sol seguirá incluido en todas las suscripciones pagas de ChatGPT—Plus, Pro, Go, Team y Edu—y no será reemplazado por un modelo inferior. Una actualización posterior indicó que se implementaron optimizaciones de inferencia y que los ahorros se transfieren a los suscriptores. Con más de 10K likes, fue la comunicación de OpenAI con mayor interacción del día.

summary.en: Anthropic announced it is extending Claude Fable 5 access on all paid plans through July 19, and keeping Claude Code's weekly rate limits 50% higher than baseline through the same date. The tweet pulled 66K+ likes — by far the day's most-engaged post — indicating the community's appetite for Fable 5 access is still running well ahead of supply. This buys builders another week to explore Fable 5 before access conditions change. Anthropic 宣布将 Claude Fable 5 的访问权限在所有付费计划中延长至7月19日，并将 Claude Code 的每周速率限制保持在基准值50%以上至同日。…
summary.zh: Anthropic宣布将Claude Fable 5访问期限延长至7月19日，所有付费计划均可使用，同时Claude Code的每周速率限制在同日期前仍保持比基准高50%。推文获逾66000点赞，是当天互动最高帖，显示社区对Fable 5访问需求远超供应。此举给开发者多一周时间探索Fable 5，直至访问条件变化。
summary.es: Anthropic anunció que extiende el acceso a Claude Fable 5 en todos los planes pagos hasta el 19 de julio y mantiene los límites semanales de Claude Code un 50% superiores al estándar hasta esa fecha. El tuit obtuvo más de 66K likes, siendo la publicación con mayor interacción del día, evidenciando que la demanda comunitaria por acceso a Fable 5 supera ampliamente la oferta. Esto brinda una semana más para explorar Fable 5 antes de que cambien las condiciones de acceso.

title.original: Guillermo Rauch · @rauchg · CEO, Vercel

summary.original: Rauch laid out a clear infrastructure philosophy: "Make the model a cog in a machine you own." His stack: Vercel AI SDK → open model API; v0.dev → open Agent API; AI Gateway → open ZDR inference. The core argument is that startups and enterprises must own their data, evals, and inference layer — not be locked into a single provider's abstractions. A strong architectural signal for any team building AI-powered products with longevity in mind. 劳赫阐明了一套清晰的基础设施哲学："让模型成为你拥有的机器中的一个齿轮。"他的技术栈：Vercel AI SDK → 开放模型 API；v0.de…
summary.en: Rauch laid out a clear infrastructure philosophy: "Make the model a cog in a machine you own." His stack: Vercel AI SDK → open model API; v0.dev → open Agent API; AI Gateway → open ZDR inference. The core argument is that startups and enterprises must own their data, evals, and inference layer — not be locked into a single provider's abstractions. A strong architectural signal for any team building AI-powered products with longevity in mind. 劳赫阐明了一套清晰的基础设施哲学："让模型成为你拥有的机器中的一个齿轮。"他的技术栈：Vercel AI SDK → 开放模型 API；v0.de…
summary.zh: Rauch阐述清晰基础设施理念：“让模型成为你所拥有机器中的一个齿轮。”他的技术栈：Vercel AI SDK→开放模型API；v0.dev→开放Agent API；AI Gateway→开放ZDR推理。核心观点是创业公司和企业必须拥有自己的数据、评估和推理层，避免锁定于单一供应商。对构建长远AI产品团队为强信号。
summary.es: Rauch expuso una clara filosofía de infraestructura: “Haz que el modelo sea un engranaje en una máquina que poseas.” Su stack: Vercel AI SDK → API de modelos abiertos; v0.dev → API de agente abierto; AI Gateway → inferencia ZDR abierta. El argumento clave es que startups y empresas deben poseer sus datos, evaluaciones y capa de inferencia, sin quedar atrapados en las abstracciones de un solo proveedor. Una señal arquitectónica fuerte para equipos que construyen productos AI con visión a largo plazo.

title.original: Amjad Masad · @amasad · CEO, Replit
title.en: Amjad Masad · @amasad · CEO, Replit
title.zh: Amjad Masad · @amasad · Replit首席执行官
title.es: Amjad Masad · @amasad · CEO, Replit

summary.original: Masad is running what he calls "Vibe Research" — fine-tuning a Qwen-8b model to play chess on Replit with three parallel experimental branches, while Replit's computer use model plays against his chess engine in the same environment. It's a live illustration of what agentic coding environments unlock: a CEO simultaneously doing ML research, running experiments, and building a product, all within one workspace and without switching context. 马沙正在进行他所称的"氛围研究"——在 Replit 上微调 Qwen-8b 模型下棋，同时运行三个并行实验分支，而 Replit 的计算机使用模型则…
summary.en: Masad is running what he calls "Vibe Research" — fine-tuning a Qwen-8b model to play chess on Replit with three parallel experimental branches, while Replit's computer use model plays against his chess engine in the same environment. It's a live illustration of what agentic coding environments unlock: a CEO simultaneously doing ML research, running experiments, and building a product, all within one workspace and without switching context. 马沙正在进行他所称的"氛围研究"——在 Replit 上微调 Qwen-8b 模型下棋，同时运行三个并行实验分支，而 Replit 的计算机使用模型则…
summary.zh: Masad正在进行所谓“氛围研究”，微调Qwen-8b模型以在Replit平台下棋，同时运行三个并行实验分支，Replit的计算机使用模型与他的棋艺引擎在同环境对弈。此举实景展示了能动编程环境如何让CEO同时进行机器学习研究、试验和产品构建，全在同一工作区，无需切换上下文。
summary.es: Masad está llevando a cabo lo que llama "Investigación de Vibe" — afinando un modelo Qwen-8b para jugar ajedrez en Replit con tres ramas experimentales paralelas, mientras el modelo de uso computacional de Replit juega contra su motor de ajedrez en el mismo entorno. Es una ilustración en vivo de lo que entornos de codificación agentiva desbloquean: un CEO haciendo investigación ML, ejecutando experimentos y construyendo un producto, todo dentro de un espacio de trabajo sin cambiar de contexto.

title.original: Zara Zhang · @zarazhangrui · Builder / GitHub

summary.original: Zhang shared a workflow worth stealing: "Try 'meeting transcript as PRD' — discuss a feature's implementation with a colleague, send the transcript to Codex, and it builds the prototype as we discussed. The meeting is the prompt." This collapses the gap between design conversation and implementation, eliminating the spec-writing handoff that slows most teams by days. 张分享了一个值得借鉴的工作流程："试试'会议记录即产品需求文档'——和同事讨论功能实现，把记录发给 Codex，它就会按我们讨论的内容构建原型。会议就是提示词。"这消弭了设计对话与实现之间的鸿沟，省去了通常会让团队慢好几天的规格编写交接环节。
summary.en: Zhang shared a workflow worth stealing: "Try 'meeting transcript as PRD' — discuss a feature's implementation with a colleague, send the transcript to Codex, and it builds the prototype as we discussed. The meeting is the prompt." This collapses the gap between design conversation and implementation, eliminating the spec-writing handoff that slows most teams by days. 张分享了一个值得借鉴的工作流程："试试'会议记录即产品需求文档'——和同事讨论功能实现，把记录发给 Codex，它就会按我们讨论的内容构建原型。会议就是提示词。"这消弭了设计对话与实现之间的鸿沟，省去了通常会让团队慢好几天的规格编写交接环节。
summary.zh: 张分享了一个值得借鉴的工作流程：“试试‘会议记录即产品需求文档’——与同事讨论功能实现，发送记录给Codex，Codex按讨论内容构建原型。会议即提示词。”这消弭设计与实现的鸿沟，省去拖慢团队数天的规格交接环节。
summary.es: Zhang compartió un flujo de trabajo para replicar: "Intenta 'transcripción de reunión como PRD'— discute la implementación de una función con un colega, envía la transcripción a Codex, y él construye el prototipo según lo discutido. La reunión es el prompt." Esto reduce la brecha entre la conversación de diseño e implementación, eliminando la entrega de especificaciones que suele retrasar a la mayoría de los equipos por días.

title.original: Aaron Levie · @levie · CEO, Box
title.en: Aaron Levie · @levie · CEO, Box
title.zh: Aaron Levie · @levie · Box CEO
title.es: Aaron Levie · @levie · CEO de Box

summary.original: Levie named what he sees as one of the defining architectural questions of the century: how do enterprises maximize corporate IP — decisions, insights, workflow patterns, best practices — in an AI-driven world? The implication is that enterprise AI moat is less about raw data access and more about capturing and operationalizing tacit organizational knowledge. Box is positioning directly at this intersection. 莱维提出了他眼中本世纪最重要的架构问题之一：在 AI 驱动的世界中，企业如何最大化其企业知识产权——决策、洞见、工作流模式、最佳实践？这意味着企业 AI 的护城河与其说是原始数据访问，不如说是隐性组织知识的捕获和运…
summary.en: Levie named what he sees as one of the defining architectural questions of the century: how do enterprises maximize corporate IP — decisions, insights, workflow patterns, best practices — in an AI-driven world? The implication is that enterprise AI moat is less about raw data access and more about capturing and operationalizing tacit organizational knowledge. Box is positioning directly at this intersection. 莱维提出了他眼中本世纪最重要的架构问题之一：在 AI 驱动的世界中，企业如何最大化其企业知识产权——决策、洞见、工作流模式、最佳实践？这意味着企业 AI 的护城河与其说是原始数据访问，不如说是隐性组织知识的捕获和运…
summary.zh: 莱维提出本世纪关键架构问题之一：企业如何在AI驱动世界中最大化其企业知识产权——决策、洞见、工作流模式、最佳实践？这意味着企业AI护城河更依赖隐性组织知识的捕获与运用，而非单纯数据访问。Box正定位于此交汇点。
summary.es: Levie nombró una de las preguntas arquitectónicas definitorias del siglo: ¿cómo maximizan las empresas la propiedad intelectual corporativa—decisiones, conocimientos, patrones de flujo de trabajo, mejores prácticas—en un mundo impulsado por IA? La implicación es que el foso empresarial en IA depende menos del acceso a datos brutos y más de capturar y operacionalizar el conocimiento tácito organizacional. Box se posiciona directamente en esta intersección.

title.original: swyx · @swyx · AI researcher / latentspace.ai
title.en: swyx · @swyx · AI researcher / latentspace.ai
title.zh: swyx · @swyx · AI研究员 / latentspace.ai
title.es: swyx · @swyx · Investigador de IA / latentspace.ai

summary.original: A sharp quip that landed in the AI inference debate: "the difference is introspection/backpropagation — as einstein famously said, the definition of insanity is doing multiple rollouts with no expectation of advantage." The point: inference-time sampling without a gradient signal (rollouts) is categorically different from learning with backpropagation. Worth bookmarking for the next time someone conflates test-time scaling with actual reasoning or training. 在 AI 推理辩论中击中要害的一句俏皮话："区别在于内省/反向传播——正如爱因斯坦的名言，疯狂的定义是在没有优势预…
summary.en: A sharp quip that landed in the AI inference debate: "the difference is introspection/backpropagation — as einstein famously said, the definition of insanity is doing multiple rollouts with no expectation of advantage." The point: inference-time sampling without a gradient signal (rollouts) is categorically different from learning with backpropagation. Worth bookmarking for the next time someone conflates test-time scaling with actual reasoning or training. 在 AI 推理辩论中击中要害的一句俏皮话："区别在于内省/反向传播——正如爱因斯坦的名言，疯狂的定义是在没有优势预…
summary.zh: 在AI推理辩论中的犀利点评：“区别在于内省/反向传播——爱因斯坦名言，疯狂定义是反复尝试无优势的方案。”意思是，没有梯度信号的推理（rollouts）与基于反向传播的学习截然不同。值得收藏，下次有人混淆测试时扩展与真正推理或训练时再用。
summary.es: Una aguda frase en el debate sobre inferencia AI: “la diferencia está en la introspección/backpropagation — como dijo Einstein, la definición de locura es hacer múltiples ejecuciones sin esperar ventaja.” El punto: el muestreo en inferencia sin señal de gradiente (rollouts) es categóricamente diferente del aprendizaje con backpropagation. Vale la pena guardar para cuando alguien confunda la escalabilidad en test con razonamiento o entrenamiento real.

title.original: Peter Yang · @petergyang · AI educator / content creator
title.en: Peter Yang · @petergyang · AI educator / content creator
title.zh: Peter Yang · @petergyang · AI教育者 / 内容创作者
title.es: Peter Yang · @petergyang · Educador de IA / Creador de contenido

summary.original: Yang made a pointed observation: Anthropic makes great models but communicates in a corporate, distanced way compared to OpenAI's direct community presence. His take — when community sentiment turns, the right move is to communicate more humanly, not retreat into corporate speak. A useful lens for any AI company managing community trust during a model release cycle, and an implicit challenge to Anthropic's comms team. 杨提出了一个尖锐的观察：Anthropic 制造了出色的模型，但与 OpenAI 直接的社区存在相比，其沟通方式更为企业化、距离感更强。他的观点——当社区情绪转向时，正确的做法是更人性化地沟通，…
summary.en: Yang made a pointed observation: Anthropic makes great models but communicates in a corporate, distanced way compared to OpenAI's direct community presence. His take — when community sentiment turns, the right move is to communicate more humanly, not retreat into corporate speak. A useful lens for any AI company managing community trust during a model release cycle, and an implicit challenge to Anthropic's comms team. 杨提出了一个尖锐的观察：Anthropic 制造了出色的模型，但与 OpenAI 直接的社区存在相比，其沟通方式更为企业化、距离感更强。他的观点——当社区情绪转向时，正确的做法是更人性化地沟通，…
summary.zh: 杨指出：Anthropic造出优秀模型，但沟通方式更企业化、疏离，相较OpenAI直面社区。他认为当社区情绪转变时，应更人性化沟通而非退回企业语。对任何AI公司管理模型发布期社区信任有启示，也是对Anthropic沟通团队的隐性挑战。
summary.es: Yang hizo una observación: Anthropic hace grandes modelos pero se comunica de forma corporativa y distante, comparado con la presencia comunitaria directa de OpenAI. Su opinión: cuando el sentimiento comunitario cambia, lo correcto es comunicarse de forma más humana, no retroceder a lenguaje corporativo. Una perspectiva útil para cualquier empresa de IA que maneje la confianza comunitaria durante un ciclo de lanzamiento, y un desafío implícito para el equipo de comunicaciones de Anthropic.

summary.original: Of all the debates raging about the potential downsides of AI, there is one worry causing the most hand-wringing among AI enthusiasts in Silicon Valley — that the giant AI labs that sell proprietary models are somehow acting like Trojan horses.
summary.en: Of all the debates raging about the potential downsides of AI, there is one worry causing the most hand-wringing among AI enthusiasts in Silicon Valley — that the giant AI labs that sell proprietary models are somehow acting like Trojan horses.
summary.zh: 在关于AI潜在负面影响的众多讨论中，硅谷AI爱好者最为担忧的是大型AI实验室销售专有模型可能充当“特洛伊木马”的风险。
summary.es: De todos los debates sobre los posibles inconvenientes de la IA, una preocupación principal entre los entusiastas de IA en Silicon Valley es que los grandes laboratorios de IA que venden modelos propietarios puedan estar actuando como caballos de Troya.

summary.original: Apple would not comment on the "security breach," which allegedly allowed a former employee to download sensitive files from Apple's network long after he departed the company for rival OpenAI.
summary.en: Apple would not comment on the "security breach," which allegedly allowed a former employee to download sensitive files from Apple's network long after he departed the company for rival OpenAI.
summary.zh: 苹果未对这一“安全漏洞”发表评论，该漏洞据称允许前员工在离职后长期从苹果网络下载敏感文件，跳槽至竞争对手OpenAI。
summary.es: Apple no comentó sobre la "brecha de seguridad", que supuestamente permitió a un ex empleado descargar archivos sensibles de la red de Apple mucho después de dejar la compañía para unirse a OpenAI.

summary.original: Shein Executive Chairman Donald Tang will step down as his mission of taking the company public nears completion, three sources with direct knowledge of the matter said on Monday, retreating to an advisory role after three years as the public face of the global fast-fashion retailer. A Chinese-American billionaire who began his career in banking, Tang has acted as the Western proxy of ‌secretive Shein founder Sky Xu…
summary.en: Shein Executive Chairman Donald Tang will step down as his mission of taking the company public nears completion, three sources with direct knowledge of the matter said on Monday, retreating to an advisory role after three years as the public face of the global fast-fashion retailer. A Chinese-American billionaire who began his career in banking, Tang has acted as the Western proxy of ‌secretive Shein founder Sky Xu…
summary.zh: 有三位知情人士周一透露，Shein执行董事长Donald Tang将在带领公司完成上市任务后辞职，转为顾问角色。唐是开始从事银行业的华裔美国亿万富翁，曾是Shein创始人徐威的西方代表。
summary.es: Tres fuentes con conocimiento directo indicaron el lunes que Donald Tang, presidente ejecutivo de Shein, renunciará a medida que se complete la salida a bolsa, pasando a un rol asesor tras tres años como la cara pública de la marca mundial de moda rápida. Tang, un multimillonario chino-estadounidense que comenzó en la banca, ha actuado como representante occidental del reservado fundador de Shein, Sky Xu.

title.original: Sam Altman · @sama · CEO, OpenAI

title.zh: Sam Altman · @sama · OpenAI首席执行官
title.es: Sam Altman · @sama · CEO de OpenAI

summary.original: Sam Altman declared that "a lot of benchmarks suggest 5.6 Sol is the best model in the world right now" — and then noted, with characteristic wit, that the most reliable signal is Elon Musk being "obsessed with me again." The post crossed 49,000 likes, making it one of the highest-engagement tech posts of the week. It signals OpenAI's confidence that GPT 5.6 Sol has cleared the benchmark bar against competitors, while the Elon reference reflects the ongoing cultural rivalry between OpenAI and xAI as a live marketi…
summary.en: Sam Altman declared that "a lot of benchmarks suggest 5.6 Sol is the best model in the world right now" — and then noted, with characteristic wit, that the most reliable signal is Elon Musk being "obsessed with me again." The post crossed 49,000 likes, making it one of the highest-engagement tech posts of the week. It signals OpenAI's confidence that GPT 5.6 Sol has cleared the benchmark bar against competitors, while the Elon reference reflects the ongoing cultural rivalry between OpenAI and xAI as a live marketi…
summary.zh: Sam Altman 宣布“许多基准测试显示5.6 Sol是目前世界上最好的模型”，并以其标志性幽默指出最可靠的信号是埃隆·马斯克又一次“着迷于我”。该帖子点赞超过49,000次，成为本周互动最高的科技帖子之一。这表明OpenAI对GPT 5.6 Sol击败竞争对手的信心，而提及埃隆也反映了OpenAI与xAI之间持续的文化竞争。
summary.es: Sam Altman declaró que "muchos benchmarks sugieren que 5.6 Sol es el mejor modelo del mundo actualmente" y luego señaló, con su característico ingenio, que la señal más confiable es que Elon Musk está "obsesionado conmigo otra vez". La publicación alcanzó más de 49,000 likes, siendo una de las publicaciones tecnológicas con mayor interacción de la semana. Esto señala la confianza de OpenAI en que GPT 5.6 Sol ha superado a la competencia, mientras que la referencia a Elon refleja la rivalidad cultural entre OpenAI y xAI como una estrategia de marketing en vivo.

summary.original: Beijing’s recent cybersecurity warning against American artificial intelligence lab Anthropic is expected to accelerate a shift among Chinese developers towards domestic coding alternatives, according to analysts. China’s National Vulnerability Database (NVDB), overseen by the Ministry of Industry and Information Technology, issued an alert this week claiming multiple versions of Anthropic’s flagship Claude Code too…
summary.en: Beijing’s recent cybersecurity warning against American artificial intelligence lab Anthropic is expected to accelerate a shift among Chinese developers towards domestic coding alternatives, according to analysts. China’s National Vulnerability Database (NVDB), overseen by the Ministry of Industry and Information Technology, issued an alert this week claiming multiple versions of Anthropic’s flagship Claude Code too…
summary.zh: 分析人士称，北京近期对美国人工智能实验室Anthropic的网络安全警告，预计将加速中国开发者转向国产编码替代品。中国工业和信息化部监管的国家漏洞库本周发出警报，指出Anthropic旗舰产品Claude Code的多个版本存在问题。
summary.es: Según analistas, la reciente advertencia de ciberseguridad en Pekín contra el laboratorio estadounidense de IA Anthropic acelerará el giro de desarrolladores chinos hacia alternativas nacionales. La Base Nacional de Vulnerabilidades de China, supervisada por el Ministerio de Industria y Tecnología de la Información, emitió una alerta esta semana sobre varias versiones del Claude Code de Anthropic.

Shanghai-based Yuanjiwei on Thursday unveiled the pilot production line, saying it supports tape-out – or final stage of chip design – and cov…
summary.en: A Chinese chip start-up has launched what it claims to be the world’s first 8-inch production line for two-dimensional (2D) semiconductors, marking the country’s latest push to develop alternative chip technologies amid US curbs on its access to advanced chipmaking equipment. Shanghai-based Yuanjiwei on Thursday unveiled the pilot production line, saying it supports tape-out – or final stage of chip design – and cov…
summary.zh: 一家中国芯片初创公司宣称推出了全球首条8英寸二维半导体生产线，彰显中国在美国限制其先进芯片设备访问下，推动替代芯片技术的最新努力。上海元极微公布了该试点生产线，支持芯片设计的最后阶段等工序。
summary.es: Una startup china de chips lanzó lo que afirma es la primera línea de producción de 8 pulgadas para semiconductores 2D, marcando el último impulso de China para desarrollar tecnologías de chips alternativas en medio de restricciones estadounidenses. Yuanjiwei, con sede en Shanghái, presentó la línea piloto, que soporta la etapa final del diseño de chips.

summary.en: Online retail giant Shein Global Holdings has secured approval from the China Securities Regulatory Commission (CSRC) to seek an initial public offering in Hong Kong, a long-awaited step for the firm after its attempts to list in New York or London stalled. summary.es: El gigante minorista en línea Shein Global Holdings ha obtenido la aprobación de la Comisión Reguladora de Valores de China (CSRC) para buscar una oferta pública inicial en Hong Kong, un paso largamente esperado tras los intentos fallidos de cotizar en Nueva York o Londres. summary.en: Ties van der Meer doesn’t know how many siblings he has. The 47-year-old was conceived at a private fertility clinic in the Netherlands using sperm provided by an anonymous donor. After the Netherlands banned anonymous donation in 2004, the doctor who ran the clinic destroyed records that might have identified those donors, he says. He…
summary.zh: Ties van der Meer 不知道自己有多少兄弟姐妹。这位47岁的男子是在荷兰一家私人生育诊所，通过匿名捐赠者提供的精子受孕。荷兰于2004年禁止匿名捐赠后，诊所医生销毁了可能识别捐赠者的记录。
summary.es: Ties van der Meer no sabe cuántos hermanos tiene. El hombre de 47 años fue concebido en una clínica de fertilidad privada en los Países Bajos, usando esperma de un donante anónimo. Tras la prohibición de la donación anónima en 2004 en los Países Bajos, el médico de la clínica destruyó los registros que podrían identificar a esos donantes.

summary.en: The AI firm Anthropic has developed a technique that has given it the clearest glimpse yet at what’s really going on inside large language models as they answer questions or carry out tasks. What they found ranges from the mundane to the unnerving. Researchers at the company built a tool called the Jacobian lens (or…
summary.zh: AI公司Anthropic开发了一种技术，让其清晰观察大型语言模型在回答问题或执行任务时内部的真实运作，发现内容既平凡又有些令人不安。研究人员打造了一种名为Jacobian lens的工具。
summary.es: La empresa de IA Anthropic desarrolló una técnica que le ha dado la visión más clara de lo que realmente sucede dentro de grandes modelos de lenguaje al responder preguntas o realizar tareas. Lo que encontraron va desde lo mundano hasta lo inquietante. Los investigadores crearon una herramienta llamada Jacobian lens.

Last year the Trump administration set a goal to see three new microreactors achieve criticality, a technical milestone establishing that a reactor can…
summary.en: I was really looking forward to July 4, and not just because I love a poolside barbecue. This year the American holiday also marked a big symbolic deadline for US nuclear power. Last year the Trump administration set a goal to see three new microreactors achieve criticality, a technical milestone establishing that a reactor can…
summary.zh: 我非常期待7月4日，不仅因为我喜欢池畔烧烤。今年这一天也象征着美国核能的重要节点。去年特朗普政府设定目标，期望三座微型反应堆实现临界，这是确认反应堆可持续运行的技术里程碑。
summary.es: Esperaba con ansias el 4 de julio, no solo por disfrutar una barbacoa junto a la piscina. Este año, la festividad estadounidense también marcó un importante hito simbólico para la energía nuclear en EE. UU. El año pasado, la administración Trump se propuso que tres nuevos microreactores alcanzaran la criticidad, un hito técnico que establece que un reactor puede operar sosteniblemente.

The divestment will reduce Tencent’s shareholding in Kuaishou to 9.37 per cent from 15.68 per cent, meaning the tech giant would cease…

The divestment will reduce Tencent’s shareholding in Kuaishou to 9.37 per cent from 15.68 per cent, meaning the tech giant would cease…

summary.es: Tencent vendió 273 millones de acciones Clase B de Kuaishou, haciendo caer sus acciones un 12%. Esto tras liderar una ronda de financiación de US$3 mil millones para Kling AI, unidad de video AI de Kuaishou.

summary.original: Tech giant Alibaba Group Holding has secured a temporary legal reprieve that effectively allows it to resume lobbying in the United States, the latest development in its dispute with the Pentagon after the firm was included on a blacklist of companies deemed to support China’s military. A judge in the Northern District of California on Sunday ordered the Department of Defence not to enforce a lobbying prohibition ag…
summary.en: Tech giant Alibaba Group Holding has secured a temporary legal reprieve that effectively allows it to resume lobbying in the United States, the latest development in its dispute with the Pentagon after the firm was included on a blacklist of companies deemed to support China’s military. A judge in the Northern District of California on Sunday ordered the Department of Defence not to enforce a lobbying prohibition ag…
summary.zh: 科技巨头阿里巴巴集团获得临时法律豁免，得以在美国恢复游说活动，这是其与五角大楼争议的最新进展。加州北区一位法官周日下令国防部暂停执行游说禁令。
summary.es: El gigante tecnológico Alibaba Group obtuvo una prórroga legal temporal que le permite reanudar el cabildeo en EE. UU., tras ser incluido en una lista negra de empresas que apoyan al ejército chino. Un juez del Distrito Norte de California ordenó al Departamento de Defensa no hacer cumplir la prohibición de cabildeo.

summary.original: This episode of Huberman Lab Essentials explores the biology and psychology of obsessive-compulsive disorder (OCD). The host explains the neural circuitry involved in OCD, providing listeners with a scientific understanding of the condition. This makes the episode valuable for anyone interested in the brain mechanisms behind OCD and current approaches to its treatment. The explanation appears to be rooted in neuroscience, offering an informative perspective based on biological and psychological factors.
summary.en: This episode of Huberman Lab Essentials explores the biology and psychology of obsessive-compulsive disorder (OCD). summary.zh: 本期节目探讨强迫症的生物学与心理学基础，讲解了相关神经回路，为关注OCD大脑机制及治疗方法的听众提供科学视角。
summary.es: Este episodio de Huberman Lab Essentials explora la biología y psicología del trastorno obsesivo-compulsivo (TOC), explicando la circuitería neural involucrada, ofreciendo una perspectiva científica sobre los mecanismos cerebrales y tratamientos actuales del TOC.

title.original: Cooking with Engram’s CEO: AI Memory, Context Rot, RAG, and Continual Learning — Dan Biderman
title.en: Cooking with Engram’s CEO: AI Memory, Context Rot, RAG, and Continual Learning — Dan Biderman
title.zh: 与Engram CEO一起烹饪：AI记忆、上下文衰减、检索增强生成（RAG）与持续学习 — Dan Biderman
title.es: Cocinando con el CEO de Engram: Memoria AI, degradación del contexto, RAG y aprendizaje continuo — Dan Biderman

summary.original: In this episode of Latent Space, Dan Biderman, the co-founder and CEO of Engram, joins host Allen Park to cook Mediterranean meatballs with yellow rice while discussing AI-related topics. The conversation focuses on challenges with AI memory, including context length limitations, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), and continual learning. This podcast may appeal to those interested in AI development and memory problems in artificial intelligence systems, as indicated by the episode title and description.
summary.en: In this episode of Latent Space, Dan Biderman, the co-founder and CEO of Engram, joins host Allen Park to cook Mediterranean meatballs with yellow rice while discussing AI-related topics. The conversation focuses on challenges with AI memory, including context length limitations, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), and continual learning. This podcast may appeal to those interested in AI development and memory problems in artificial intelligence systems, as indicated by the episode title and description.

Ideal para quienes se interesan en desarrollo de IA y problemas de memoria en sistemas de inteligencia artificial.

title.original: How to Improve Your Memory & Cognitive Function at Any Age | Dr. Alan Castel
title.en: How to Improve Your Memory & Cognitive Function at Any Age | Dr. Alan Castel
title.zh: 如何在任何年龄提升记忆与认知功能 | Dr. Alan Castel
title.es: Cómo mejorar la memoria y función cognitiva a cualquier edad | Dr. Alan Castel

summary.original: This Huberman Lab podcast episode features Dr. Alan Castel, a UCLA psychology professor and expert on human memory and cognitive aging. The discussion delves into how to improve learning ability and memory at any age, explaining memory function, false memories, and strategies like curiosity and self-testing to strengthen memory. It also explores traits of "superagers" who improve cognitive capacity with age. The episode offers comprehensive scientific insights and practical tools for maintaining cognitive function across the lifespan.
summary.en: This Huberman Lab podcast episode features Dr. Alan Castel, a UCLA psychology professor and expert on human memory and cognitive aging. The discussion delves into how to improve learning ability and memory at any age, explaining memory function, false memories, and strategies like curiosity and self-testing to strengthen memory. It also explores traits of "superagers" who improve cognitive capacity with age. The episode offers comprehensive scientific insights and practical tools for maintaining cognitive function across the lifespan.
summary.zh: Huberman Lab播客邀请UCLA心理学教授Alan Castel博士，探讨如何在任何年龄提升学习能力与记忆，解析假记忆、好奇心与自我测试等记忆强化策略，并介绍“超级老人”认知能力提升特征，提供科学洞见与实用工具。
summary.es: El episodio del podcast Huberman Lab presenta al Dr. Alan Castel, profesor de psicología en UCLA y experto en memoria y envejecimiento, quien analiza cómo mejorar el aprendizaje y la memoria a cualquier edad, explicando funciones de la memoria, falsos recuerdos, estrategias como la curiosidad y autoevaluación para fortalecerla, además de características de los "superagers" que mejoran la capacidad cognitiva.

title.original: Why the tech workforce is quietly splitting in two | Annual AI sentiment survey (Noam Segal)

summary.original: Lenny's Podcast episode features Noam Segal, a research leader with experience at companies like Airbnb, Meta, and Twitter. The episode discusses how the tech workforce is quietly splitting into two groups, as suggested by the title and meta description. Insights likely include findings from the annual AI sentiment survey, focusing on workforce division, tech careers, and attitudes toward AI, making it valuable for those interested in workforce trends and AI impact in tech.
summary.en: Lenny's Podcast episode features Noam Segal, a research leader with experience at companies like Airbnb, Meta, and Twitter. The episode discusses how the tech workforce is quietly splitting into two groups, as suggested by the title and meta description. title.original: #399 ‒ The evolution of Alzheimer's disease and dementia care: how early detection, personalized treatment, new therapies, and a multimodal approach are changing the landscape | Gayatri Devi, M.D.
title.en: #399 ‒ The evolution of Alzheimer's disease and dementia care: how early detection, personalized treatment, new therapies, and a multimodal approach are changing the landscape | Gayatri Devi, M.D.
title.zh: 阿尔茨海默病与痴呆护理的演变：早期检测、个性化治疗、新疗法及多模式策略改变格局 | Gayatri Devi医生
title.es: La evolución del cuidado del Alzheimer y demencia: detección precoz, tratamiento personalizado, nuevas terapias y enfoque multimodal que cambian el panorama | Dra. Gayatri Devi

summary.original: In this episode of The Peter Attia Drive, Gayatri Devi, a neurologist specializing in memory disorders including Alzheimer's disease and related dementias, discusses how dementia is viewed as a spectrum and the advances in personalized treatment. Gayatri explains biomarkers, early detection, anti-amyloid therapies, and explores the role of menopause and cognition. She also covers a multimodal approach to treatment and the future role of AI and precision medicine in dementia care. The episode provides an in-depth look at evolving approaches to Alzheimer's and dementia care.
summary.en: In this episode of The Peter Attia Drive, Gayatri Devi, a neurologist specializing in memory disorders including Alzheimer's disease and related dementias, discusses how dementia is viewed as a spectrum and the advances in personalized treatment. Gayatri explains biomarkers, early detection, anti-amyloid therapies, and explores the role of menopause and cognition. She also covers a multimodal approach to treatment and the future role of AI and precision medicine in dementia care. The episode provides an in-depth look at evolving approaches to Alzheimer's and dementia care.
summary.zh: Peter Attia Drive节目邀请神经科专家Gayatri Devi医生，讨论痴呆作为连续体的观点、个性化治疗进展、生物标志物、早期检测、抗淀粉样蛋白疗法及更年期与认知关联，介绍多模式治疗方法及未来AI与精准医疗在痴呆护理中的作用，深入解析阿尔茨海默病护理新趋势。
summary.es: En este episodio de The Peter Attia Drive, la neuróloga Gayatri Devi, especialista en trastornos de la memoria como Alzheimer y demencias, aborda la demencia como un espectro, avances en tratamientos personalizados, biomarcadores, detección temprana, terapias anti-amiloides y el papel de la menopausia en la cognición. También explora un enfoque multimodal y el futuro de la IA y la medicina de precisión en el cuidado de demencias, ofreciendo una mirada profunda a las tendencias cambiantes en el cuidado del Alzheimer.

title.original: How tech workers actually feel about AI in 2026 | Annual AI sentiment survey (Noam Segal)
title.en: How tech workers actually feel about AI in 2026 | Annual AI sentiment survey (Noam Segal)
title.zh: 科技工作者对2026年AI的真实感受｜年度AI情绪调查（Noam Segal）
title.es: Cómo se sienten realmente los trabajadores tecnológicos sobre la IA en 2026 | Encuesta anual de sentimiento AI (Noam Segal)

summary.original: This episode of Lenny's Podcast features Noam Segal, who co-leads an extensive annual Tech Worker Sentiment Survey capturing thousands of responses across various tech roles. The discussion covers nuanced feelings about AI in 2026, highlighting a bifurcation in the tech workforce where half are thriving and half are struggling, with record-high burnout rates. Topics also include emotional archetypes among tech workers, concerns beyond AI-driven job loss, and advice for managers and employees. The episode offers a quantitative view into how tech professionals perceive their careers and AI's effects.
summary.en: This episode of Lenny's Podcast features Noam Segal, who co-leads an extensive annual Tech Worker Sentiment Survey capturing thousands of responses across various tech roles. The discussion covers nuanced feelings about AI in 2026, highlighting a bifurcation in the tech workforce where half are thriving and half are struggling, with record-high burnout rates. Topics also include emotional archetypes among tech workers, concerns beyond AI-driven job loss, and advice for managers and employees. The episode offers a quantitative view into how tech professionals perceive their careers and AI's effects.
summary.zh: 本期Lenny播客邀请Noam Segal共同领导的大型年度科技工作者情绪调查，收集了数千名技术岗位人员反馈。讨论展现了2026年科技工作者对AI的复杂情绪，反映劳动力一分为二：一半繁荣，一半挣扎，以及创纪录的倦怠率。内容也涵盖技术人员的情绪类型、超越AI失业的担忧，以及对管理者和员工的建议。
summary.es: Este episodio del Podcast de Lenny presenta a Noam Segal, co-líder de una extensa encuesta anual de sentimiento de trabajadores tecnológicos con miles de respuestas en diversos roles. El análisis muestra sentimientos matizados sobre la IA en 2026, evidenciando una bifurcación en la fuerza laboral tecnológica donde la mitad prospera y la otra mitad enfrenta dificultades, con niveles récord de agotamiento. También aborda arquetipos emocionales, preocupaciones más allá de la pérdida de empleo por IA y consejos para gerentes y empleados.

title.original: The Cognitive Science of Building a Mind — Danielle Perszyk, Amazon AGI Lab

The discussion centers on why AI agents don't truly understand users, offering insights into the challenges of building a mind in artificial general intelligence. This episode may be of interest to listeners keen on AI and cognitive science, as it explores foundational questions about machine understanding and intelligence.

title.original: Adam Brown – A deep but accessible introduction to general relativity
title.en: Adam Brown – A deep but accessible introduction to general relativity
title.zh: Adam Brown——对广义相对论的深入而易懂介绍
title.es: Adam Brown – Una introducción profunda pero accesible a la relatividad general

summary.original: This episode features Adam Brown explaining general relativity in an accessible way. Adam previously taught a comprehensive 20-lecture graduate course at Stanford on the topic and now distills its central idea and Einstein's "happiest thought" clearly for a general audience. The conversation covers why black holes are considered ultimate power plants and explores differences in observation between distant and infalling observers around black holes. Adam now leads BlueShift at Google DeepMind, a team focused on science and reasoning. The episode also touches briefly on AI's potential to rediscover general relativity, offering a mix of physics insight and scientific philosophy.
summary.en: This episode features Adam Brown explaining general relativity in an accessible way. Adam previously taught a comprehensive 20-lecture graduate course at Stanford on the topic and now distills its central idea and Einstein's "happiest thought" clearly for a general audience. The conversation covers why black holes are considered ultimate power plants and explores differences in observation between distant and infalling observers around black holes. Adam now leads BlueShift at Google DeepMind, a team focused on science and reasoning. The episode also touches briefly on AI's potential to rediscover general relativity, offering a mix of physics insight and scientific philosophy.
summary.zh: 此节目Adam Brown以通俗方式讲解广义相对论。他曾在斯坦福开设20讲毕业课程，现为Google DeepMind BlueShift团队负责人，专注科学与推理。内容涵盖黑洞为何为终极能量源及不同观察者的视角差异，亦简述AI重现广义相对论的潜力，融合物理洞见与科学哲学。
summary.es: Este episodio presenta a Adam Brown explicando la relatividad general de forma accesible. Anteriormente dictó un curso de posgrado de 20 conferencias en Stanford y ahora lidera BlueShift en Google DeepMind, enfocado en ciencia y razonamiento. La charla cubre por qué los agujeros negros son las centrales energéticas definitivas y diferencias de observación entre observadores distantes e inyectados, además del posible papel de la IA para redescubrir la relatividad general, mezclando física y filosofía científica.

title.original: The rise of taste, human authenticity and judgment in an AI world | Adam Mosseri (Head of IG)
title.en: The rise of taste, human authenticity and judgment in an AI world | Adam Mosseri (Head of IG)

Given Mosseri's leadership over a major social media platform and the team behind Threads, the conversation likely addresses how AI impacts human expression and decision-making in digital spaces, making it relevant for those interested in AI's role in culture and technology.

title.original: Adam Mosseri: AI is a tailwind for authenticity
title.en: Adam Mosseri: AI is a tailwind for authenticity
title.zh: Adam Mosseri：人工智能助力真实感提升
title.es: Adam Mosseri: La IA impulsa la autenticidad

summary.original: Adam Mosseri, Head of Instagram, discusses in depth the evolving structure of product teams and the rise of the "product staff" role, blending PM, design, data science, and research skills. He shares thoughts on Instagram's algorithm and how AI-generated content acts as a tailwind for authenticity on the platform. The episode delves into challenges faced and lessons learned during his leadership, including reflections on product failures. It offers valuable insights into product development and AI's influence on social media and creator identity.
summary.en: Adam Mosseri, Head of Instagram, discusses in depth the evolving structure of product teams and the rise of the "product staff" role, blending PM, design, data science, and research skills. He shares thoughts on Instagram's algorithm and how AI-generated content acts as a tailwind for authenticity on the platform. The episode delves into challenges faced and lessons learned during his leadership, including reflections on product failures. It offers valuable insights into product development and AI's influence on social media and creator identity.
summary.zh: Instagram负责人Adam Mosseri深入探讨了产品团队结构的演变及“产品员工”角色的兴起，这一角色融合了产品经理、设计、数据科学和研究技能。他分享了Instagram算法相关观点，认为AI生成内容促进了平台上的真实感。本集深入分析了他领导期间所面临的挑战和经验教训，包括对产品失败的反思，提供了关于产品开发和AI对社交媒体及创作者身份影响的宝贵见解。
